Industrial Cellular Router R40 DATA SHEET Version Description Version
1. Product Overview 3
2. Typical Application Scenarios 3
3. Product Specifications 4 4. Product Selection 6 5. Electromagnetic Compatibility Testing 7 6. Environmental Suitability Testing 8
Product Overview

The industrial-grade 4G cellular router R40 adopts an industrial-grade design and is equipped with a built-in industrial 4G communication module, providing users with high-speed remote wireless network access. It is widely used in industries such as M2M, telemetry, industrial IoT, transportation, new retail, water conservancy, smart cities, meteorology, fire protection, remote sensing, and natural disaster monitoring, enabling remote wireless data transmission and network access.

The industrial-grade 4G cellular router R40 provides three standard RJ45 10/100Mbps LAN ports and one standard RJ45 10/100Mbps WAN port, which can also be configured as a LAN port. An optional PoE PSE function compliant with IEEE 802.3af/at standards is available,making it convenient to supply stable power to on-site network devices while reducing cabling costs.

The industrial-grade 4G cellular router R40 supports WiFi and can operate in both STA and AP modes, allowing wireless devices to quickly and easily connect to the network. It supports dual SIM cards and features automatic failover between wired and wireless networks, ensuring a reliable and uninterrupted network connection.
The industrial-grade 4G cellular router R40 supports VPN protocols such as L2TP, IPSEC, and OPENVPN, providing secure data communication protection.

The industrial-grade 4G cellular router R40 features a built-in independent hardware watchdog. With professionally engineered electrical performance and rigorous high and low temperature testing, it ensures stable operation even in harsh environments.
Typical Application Scenarios ✓ Unattended Machine Room Monitoring
✓ Remote Wireless Network Access
✓ Smart City Applications ✓ Tunnel Remote Monitoring ✓ Bridge Safety Remote Monitoring ✓ Weather Station Data Remote Transmission

Product Overview

The 4G Industrial-grade Edge Control Terminal R40A/R40B Series is a low-cost, high-performance, lightweight industrial-grade edge control terminal that integrates network transmission,data acquisition, edge computing, logic control, and cloud platform access. Its industrial-grade design and high reliability can meet the requirements for long-term stable operation in harsh environments, providing a full-stack solution for the Industrial Internet of Things (IIoT).
Key Features
Multi-mode Communication Capability
Supports 4G full Netcom, dual SIM card redundancy design, and features automatic wired/wireless link switching to ensure high network availability.
Built-in WiFi module (STA/AP mode) for easy access to wireless devices.
Rich Interface and Protocol Support
Provides 3×10/100Mbps LAN ports, 1×10/100Mbps WAN/LAN multiplexed port, and optional PoE power supply (IEEE 802.3af/at) to reduce wiring complexity.

Integrates DI/DO/AI and RS485/RS232 interfaces, supports Modbus master protocol, and can be expanded to collect 2000+ data points. Edge Computing and Security Local data processing and logic control capabilities, supporting cloud-edge-device collaborative management.
Supports protocols such as L2TP/IPSec/OpenVPN to ensure secure data transmission. Industrial-grade Reliability

Product Overview
The 4G Industrial-grade Edge Control Terminal R40A/R40B Series is a low-cost, high-performance, lightweight industrial-grade edge control terminal that integrates network transmission,data acquisition, edge computing, logic control, and cloud platform access. Its industrial-grade design and high reliability can meet the requirements for long-term stable operation in harsh environments, providing a full-stack solution for the Industrial Internet of Things (IIoT).
Key Features
Multi-mode Communication Capability
Supports 4G full Netcom, dual SIM card redundancy design, and features automatic wired/wireless link switching to ensure high network availability.
Built-in WiFi module (STA/AP mode) for easy access to wireless devices.
Rich Interface and Protocol Support
Provides 3×10/100Mbps LAN ports, 1×10/100Mbps WAN/LAN multiplexed port, and optional PoE power supply (IEEE 802.3af/at) to reduce wiring complexity.
Integrates DI/DO/AI and RS485/RS232 interfaces, supports Modbus master protocol, and can be expanded to collect 2000+ data points.
Edge Computing and Security
Local data processing and logic control capabilities, supporting cloud-edge-device collaborative management.
Supports protocols such as L2TP/IPSec/OpenVPN to ensure secure data transmission.
Industrial-grade Reliability
Passed EMC/EMI testing, wide temperature design, built-in hardware watchdog, adapts to harsh environments.
Typical Application Scenarios
✔ Unattended equipment room/tunnel monitoring
✔ Meteorological/hydrological data acquisition
✔ ATM/vending machine networking
✔ Bridge/dam safety monitoring
✔ Forest fire early warning
✔ Smart city terminal access
✔ Power/energy remote monitoring
✔ Geological disaster monitoring
✔ Wireless backhaul for mobile devices

Overview

ARMxy BL310 Series is an industrial-grade ARM controller that allows flexible selection of the SOM board and I/O interfaces. It uses NXP's classic i.MX6ULL industrial-grade high-performance and low-power SoC, based on the advanced ARM Cortex-A7 core, with a clock speed of up to 800MHz. The BL310 series combines high performance, ultra-efficiency, and low cost. It is widely used in fields such as industrial IoT gateways, industrial control, smart terminals, automation control, rail transportation, power, Industry 4.0, smart manufacturing, industrial testing, and medical equipment.
Key Features:
High-Performance Process or
The device uses the NXP i.MX6ULL SoC, based on the ARM Cortex-A7 core, with a clock speed of up to 800MHz, meeting high-performance computing needs.

Overview

ARMxy BL310 Series is an industrial-grade ARM controller that allows flexible selection of the SOM board and I/O interfaces. It uses NXP's classic i.MX6ULL industrial-grade high-performance and low-power SoC, based on the advanced ARM Cortex-A7 core, with a clock speed of up to 800MHz. The BL310 series combines high performance, ultra-efficiency, and low cost. It is widely used in fields such as industrial IoT gateways, industrial control, smart terminals, automation control, rail transportation, power, Industry 4.0, smart manufacturing, industrial testing, and medical equipment.
Key Features:
High-Performance Process or
The device uses the NXP i.MX6ULL SoC, based on the ARM Cortex-A7 core, with a clock speed of up to 800MHz, meeting high-performance computing needs.
Rich Interface Configuration :

2 x 10/100Mbps adaptive RJ45 Ethernet ports. 2 x USB 2.0 ports. Optional X-series and Y-series I/O boards, supporting various signal types such as RS485, RS232, CAN, DI, DO, relays, AI, AO, RT D , TC , and more.
Supports PWM output, pulse counting, and other data acquisition and control functions.
Built-in Mini PCIe interface, supporting Wi - Fi and 4 G for wireless communication. Rapid Development and Effortless Integration:

Built-in BLIoTLink industrial protocol conversion software, supporting industrial data collection and conversion. Quick integration with mainstream IoT cloud platforms and industrial configuration software (e.g., SCADA). Supports BLRAT remote access tool, enabling remote operation and management.

Supports the QuickConfig tool, enabling fast configuration and efficient system management. In addition, it supports AI-assisted application development and “what-you-see-is-what-you-get” programming, making the creation of intelligent industrial solutions faster, easier, and more intuitive.
Integrated Node-Red for rapid IoT application development. Industrial-Grade Reliability:

Designed with professional electrical performance and high/low temperature testing, capable of stable operation in a wide temperature range of -40°C to 85°C. Resistant to electromagnetic interference, suitable for harsh industrial environments.

QuickConfig enables fast configuration and efficient system management. It also supports AI-assisted application development and intuitive “what-you-see-is-what-you-get” programming, accelerating the creation of intelligent industrial solutions.
P rotocol C onversion S oftware
BLIoTLink software s upports protocol conversion (Modbus,PLC, BACnet, IEC104, MQTT, OPC UA) and integration with major IoT/SCADA platforms such as AWS IoT Core, ThingsBoard, Ignition, Alibaba Cloud IoT, and Huawei IoT.
R emote A ccess T ool
BLRAT enables secure remote device access, allowing convenient remote operation and maintenance.
Other Software
Node-Red , Python , Docker , C# , MySQL , SQLite
P roduct S election
The ARMxy series ARM embedded controllers adopt a flexible design concept, allowing users to customize ROM and RAM combinations by choosing different System-on-Module(SOM) boards as needed. Additionally, various X and Y boards can be selected to achieve diverse IO configurations, catering to the requirements of different application scenarios.
P roduct naming convention
Host Model Number - SOM Model Number - X Board Model Number - Y1 Board Model Number - Y2 Board Model Number
For example : BL 31 0 - SOM 312 -X 4
Means 2 Ethernet port, 512 MB DDR3 L, 8GByte eMMC , and 2 RS485 +2 CAN
If you need to add Wi - Fi, then you would append "W" to the host model number.
For example: BL 31 0 W -SOM 312 -X 4
If you need to add a 4G module, you would append "L" to the host model number.
For example: BL 31 0L-SOM 312 -X 4

Overview

The ARMxy BL330 is an industrial-grade ARM controller that allows flexible selection of the SOM board and I/O interfaces. It is based on the Allwinner Technology T113-i dual-core ARM Cortex-A7 + XuanTie C906 RISC-V + HiFi4 DSP heterogeneous multi-core processor. This industrial-grade computer features an ARM Cortex-A7 processor with clock speed of up to1.2GHz.

BL330 is compatible with BLIoTLink industrial protocol conversion software for data collectionand transformation , and can s eamless integration with various mainstream IoT cloud platforms and industrial SCADA software . Users can leverage the BLRAT for remote access and maintenance of the BL330 embedded computer.

BL330 also comes with the QuickConfig tool, enabling quick configuration, system management. Additionally, it supports AI-assisted application development and “what-you-see-is-what-you-get”programming, making the creation of intelligent industrial solutions faster and more intuitive.

The BL330 series ARM embedded computer has undergone rigorous electrical performance design and high-low temperature testing to ensure stability and reliability. It is designed for DIN35 rail mounting, making it suitable for various industrial application environments.

BLIoTLink software s upports protocol conversion (Modbus,PLC, BACnet, IEC104, MQTT, OPC UA) and integration with major IoT/SCADA platforms such as AWS IoT Core, ThingsBoard, Ignition, Alibaba Cloud IoT, and Huawei IoT.
R emote A ccess T ool
BLRAT enables secure remote device access, allowing convenient remote operation and maintenance.
Other Software
Node-Red , Python , Docker , C# , MySQL , SQLite
P roduct S election
The ARMxy series ARM embedded controllers adopt a flexible design concept, allowing users to customize ROM and RAM combinations by choosing different System-on-Module(SOM) boards as needed. Additionally, various X and Y boards can be selected to achieve diverse IO configurations, catering to the requirements of different application scenarios.
P roduct naming convention
Host Model Number - SOM Model Number - X Board Model Number - Y1 Board ModelNumber - Y2 Board Model Number
For example, if we had a specific product configuration:
Host Model : BL330
SOM Model: SOM3 35
X Board Model: X 10
The complete product name would be:
BL330 - SOM33 5 -X 10
Means 1 Ethernet port, 8GByte eMMC , 1GByte DDR3, and 2 RS485 ports.
If you need to add Wi - Fi, then you would append "W" to the host model number.
For example: BL330W-SOM33 5 -X10
If you need to add a 4G module, you would append "L" to the host model number.
For example: BL330L-SOM33 5 -X10

After undergoing fundamental environmental adaptability testing, the device fully complies with the basic requirements of the Chinese GB/T national standards and corresponding IEC standards, demonstrating stable operation in standard industrial environments.
The following results ensure the device meets a wide range of industrial application scenarios:
Low/High-Temperature Tests: Validates the device’s operational capability under basic industrial environmental conditions.
Vibration and Free Fall Tests: Ensures reliability during transportation and installation.
IP Test: Complies with fundamental protection requirements for industrial environments.

Overview

The ARMxy BL33 5 is an industrial-grade ARM controller that allows flexible selection of the SOM board and I/O interfaces. This embedded computer uses the high-performance, cost-effective Allwinner T113-i chip as its core. The BL33 5 series ARM embedded computer has undergone rigorous electrical performance design and high-low temperature testing to ensure stability and reliability. It is designed for DIN35 rail mounting, making it suitable for various industrial application environments.
This embedded computer is widely used in industrial IoT, photovoltaic power generation and energy storage systems, automation control, and transportation and rail applications.
Key Features:
Rich Interface Configuration :

Overview

The ARMxy BL33 5 is an industrial-grade ARM controller that allows flexible selection of the SOM board and I/O interfaces. This embedded computer uses the high-performance, cost-effective Allwinner T113-i chip as its core. The BL33 5 series ARM embedded computer has undergone rigorous electrical performance design and high-low temperature testing to ensure stability and reliability. It is designed for DIN35 rail mounting, making it suitable for various industrial application environments.
This embedded computer is widely used in industrial IoT, photovoltaic power generation and energy storage systems, automation control, and transportation and rail applications.
Key Features:
Rich Interface Configuration :

2 x 100Mbps Ethernet port s , supporting high-speed network communication. 2 x USB 2.0 ports. O ptional X-series and Y-series I/O boards . With over 4000 different module combinations, the modules can be freely swapped to meet various needs.

Built-in Mini PCIe interface, supporting Bluetooth, Wi - Fi and 4 G for wireless communication. Multi-Operating System Support: Supports Linux-5.4.61, Linux-RT-5.4.61 kernel, and Ubuntu 20.04 operating systems. The system design is highly extensible, capable of handling complex tasks and optimizing data transfer between devices.

BEILAI Technology introduces its proprietary Node-Red graphical development tool, offering a graphical configuration interface and intuitive functional icons, reducing the usage threshold and allowing users to easily get started. Rapid Development and Effortless Integration:

Built-in BLIoTLink industrial protocol conversion software, supporting industrial data collection and conversion. Quick integration with mainstream IoT cloud platforms and industrialconfiguration software (e.g., SCADA). Supports BLRAT remote access tool, enabling remote operation and management.

Supports the QuickConfig tool, enabling fast configuration and efficient system management. In addition, it supports AI-assisted application development and “what-you-see-is-what-you-get” programming, making the creation of intelligent industrial solutions faster, easier, and more intuitive.
Professional Electrical Performance Design and Wide Application Range:
Designed with professional electrical performance and tested with high-voltage electrostatic, surge, and high/low temperature tests, ensuring system stability and reliability.
Equipped with DIN35 rail mounting, making it adaptable to various industrial environments.

Overview
The ARMxy BL33 5 is an industrial-grade ARM controller that allows flexible selection of the SOM board and I/O interfaces. This embedded computer uses the high-performance, cost-effective Allwinner T113-i chip as its core. The BL33 5 series ARM embedded computer has undergone rigorous electrical performance design and high-low temperature testing to ensure stability and reliability. It is designed for DIN35 rail mounting, making it suitable for various industrial application environments.
This embedded computer is widely used in industrial IoT, photovoltaic power generation and energy storage systems, automation control, and transportation and rail applications.
Key Features:
Rich Interface Configuration :
2 x 100Mbps Ethernet port s , supporting high-speed network communication.
2 x USB 2.0 ports.
O ptional X-series and Y-series I/O boards . With over 4000 different module combinations, the modules can be freely swapped to meet various needs.
Built-in Mini PCIe interface, supporting Bluetooth, Wi - Fi and 4 G for wireless communication.
Multi-Operating System Support:
Supports Linux-5.4.61, Linux-RT-5.4.61 kernel, and Ubuntu 20.04 operating systems.
The system design is highly extensible, capable of handling complex tasks and optimizing data transfer between devices.
Node-Red Graphical Development Tool:
BEILAI Technology introduces its proprietary Node-Red graphical development tool, offering a graphical configuration interface and intuitive functional icons, reducing the usage threshold and allowing users to easily get started.
Rapid Development and Effortless Integration:
Built-in BLIoTLink industrial protocol conversion software, supporting industrial data collection and conversion. Quick integration with mainstream IoT cloud platforms and industrialconfiguration software (e.g., SCADA).
Supports BLRAT remote access tool, enabling remote operation and management.
Supports the QuickConfig tool, enabling fast configuration and efficient system management. In addition, it supports AI-assisted application development and “what-you-see-is-what-you-get” programming, making the creation of intelligent industrial solutions faster, easier, and more intuitive.
Professional Electrical Performance Design and Wide Application Range:
Designed with professional electrical performance and tested with high-voltage electrostatic, surge, and high/low temperature tests, ensuring system stability and reliability.
Equipped with DIN35 rail mounting, making it adaptable to various industrial environments.
Widely used in industrial IoT, photovoltaic generation and energy storage systems, automation control, rail transportation, PLC control expansion, cloud data collection, supervisory production, and multi-point data collection.
The BL335 stands out with its high performance, high reliability, and rich feature configuration, meeting the demands of various complex industrial scenarios, making it an ideal embedded computer solution for industrial applications.

Overview ARMxy BL340 series ARM embedded computer is a low-cost, industrial-grade ARM edge computer with flexible IO and SoM configuration options. The BL340 series is based on Allwinner Technology’s T507-H processor, a quad-core ARM Cortex-A53 industrial controller with a maximum frequency of 1.4 GHz, paired with 8/16 GB eMMC and 1/2 GB DDR4. BL340 series ARM embedded computer supports Linux-4.9.170, Linux-RT-4.9.170, Ubuntu 20.04, Docker containers, Node-Red, and Qt-5.12.5 for GUI development. It comes preinstalled with:

BLIoTLink, an industrial protocol conversion software for fast industrial data acquisition and integration with major IoT cloud platforms and SCADA systems. BLRAT, a remote access tool for device monitoring and maintenance. QuickConfig, a rapid configuration tool for remote device setup and debugging, improving operational efficiency.
It also supports Node-Red, enabling quick IoT application development, and AI-assisted programming for a “what you see is what you get” development experience.

The BL340 series features professional electrical design and has passed high- and low-temperature testing, ensuring stable and reliable performance. It supports DIN35 rail mounting and is suitable for various industrial environments.
Typical applications include industrial IoT, edge computing gateways, photovoltaic power and energy storage systems, automation control, and rail transportation.

QuickConfig enables fast configuration and efficient system management. It also supports AI-assisted application development and intuitive “what-you-see-is-what-you-get” programming, accelerating the creation of intelligent industrialsolutions.
P rotocol C onversion S oftware
BLIoTLink software s upports protocol conversion (Modbus,PLC, BACnet, IEC104, MQTT, OPC UA) and integration with major IoT/SCADA platforms such as AWS IoT Core, ThingsBoard, Ignition, Alibaba Cloud IoT, and Huawei IoT.
R emote A ccess T ool

Other Software
Node-Red , Python , Docker , C# , MySQL , SQLite
P roduct S election
The ARMxy series ARM embedded controllers adopt a flexible design concept, allowing users to customize ROM and RAM combinations by choosing different System-on-Module(SOM) boards as needed. Additionally, various X and Y boards can be selected to achieve diverse IO configurations, catering to the requirements of different application scenarios.
P roduct naming convention
Host Model Number - SOM Model Number - X Board Model Number - Y1 Board ModelNumber - Y2 Board Model Number
For example, if we had a specific product configuration:
Host Model : BL3 4 0
SOM Model: SOM3 4 0
X Board Model: X 10
The complete product name would be:
BL3 4 0 - SOM3 4 0 -X 10
Means 1 Ethernet port, 8GB eMMC storage, 1GB DDR4 memory, and 2 RS485 ports
If you need to add Wi - Fi, then you would append "W" to the host model number.
For example: BL3 4 0 W -SOM3 4 0-X10
If you need to add a 4G module, you would append "L" to the host model number.
For example: BL3 4 0L-SOM3 4 0-X10

Overview

ARMxy Series BL350 industrial ARM embedded computer is designed based on the TI Sitara AM62x processor, offering single-core, dual-core, or quad-core ARM Cortex-A53 (up to 1.4GHz) and a single-core ARM Cortex-M4F (up to 400MHz) multi-core architecture. It uses advanced 16nm process technology, integrates a 3D graphics accelerator, and features high performance and low power consumption. The BL350 Series supports Linux-5.10.168, Linux-RT-5.10.168 kernel, Yocto 3.1 (dunfell), Debian 12 operating systems, and integrates Docker container, Node-Red visual development tool, and Qt-5.14.2 graphical interface development framework .

BL3 5 0 is compatible with BLIoTLink industrial protocol conversion software for data collectionand transformation, and can seamless integration with various mainstream IoT cloud platforms and industrial SCADA software. Users can leverage the BLRAT for remote access and maintenance of the BL3 5 0 embedded computer. BL3 5 0 also comes with the QuickConfig tool, enabling quick configuration, system management. Additionally, it supports AI-assisted application development and “what-you-see-is-what-you-get”programming, making the creation of intelligent industrial solutions faster and more intuitive.

The BL350 Series is professionally designed for electrical performance and has passedhigh and low temperature testing. It can operate stably in extreme temperatures from -40 to85℃ and harsh electromagnetic environments, supports DIN35 rail mounting, and meets the needs of various industrial applications.
Typical Application Areas

Users can leverage the BLRAT for remote access and maintenance of the BL3 5 0 embedded computer. BL3 5 0 also comes with the QuickConfig tool, enabling quick configuration, system management. Additionally, it supports AI-assisted application development and “what-you-see-is-what-you-get”programming, making the creation of intelligent industrial solutions faster and more intuitive.
The BL350 Series is professionally designed for electrical performance and has passedhigh and low temperature testing. It can operate stably in extreme temperatures from -40 to85℃ and harsh electromagnetic environments, supports DIN35 rail mounting, and meets the needs of various industrial applications.

P roduct S election
The ARMxy series ARM embedded controllers adopt a flexible design concept, allowing users to customizeROM and RAM combinations by choosing different System-on-Module(SOM) boards as needed. Additionally, various X and Y boards can be selected to achieve diverse IO configurations, catering to the requirements of different application scenarios.
P roduct naming convention
Host Model Number - SOM Model Number - X Board Model Number - Y1 Board ModeNumber - Y2 Board Model Number
For example, if we had a specific product configuration:
Host Model : BL350
SOM Model: SOM351
X Board Model: X 10
The complete product name would be:
BL350 - SOM351 -X 10
Means 1 Ethernet port, 8 GB eMMC storage, DDR4 is 1GByte, and 2 RS485
If you need to add Wi-Fi, then you would append "W" to the host model number.
For example: BL 35 0 W -SOM 351 -X10
If you need to add a 4G module, you would append "L" to the host model number.
For example: BL 35 0L-SOM 351 -X10

After undergoing fundamental environmental adaptability testing, the device fully complies with the basic requirements of the Chinese GB/T national standards and corresponding IEC standards, demonstrating stable operation in standard industrial environments.
The following results ensure the device meets a wide range of industrial application scenarios:
Low/High-Temperature Tests: Validates the device’s operational capability under basic industrial environmental conditions.
Vibration and Free Fall Tests: Ensures reliability during transportation and installation.
IP Test: Complies with fundamental protection requirements for industrial environments.

Overview
BL360 ARMxy ARM embedded computers, is an industrial-grade ARM controller
The ARMxy BL360 series ARM embedded computer is an industrial-grade ARM controller with flexible I / O and SoM configuration capabilities.

It is based on the NXP i.MX8M Mini multi-core processor, featuring a quad-core ARM Cortex-A53 (up to 1.6 GHz) and a single-core ARM Cortex-M4 (up to 400 MHz), built with an advanced 14nm process. The device supports 1080P60 H.264 hardware video encoding/decoding, 1080P60 H.265 hardware decoding, and GPU graphics acceleration.
BL360 series supports Linux-5.4.70, Yocto 3.0, Ubuntu 20.04, Docker containers, Node-Red, and Qt-5.15.0 for GUI development. It comes preinstalled with:

It is based on the NXP i.MX8M Mini multi-core processor, featuring a quad-core ARM Cortex-A53 (up to 1.6 GHz) and a single-core ARM Cortex-M4 (up to 400 MHz), built with an advanced 14nm process. The device supports 1080P60 H.264 hardware video encoding/decoding, 1080P60 H.265 hardware decoding, and GPU graphics acceleration.

BLIoTLink, an industrial protocol conversion software for rapid industrial data acquisition and integration with major IoT cloud platforms and SCADA systems. Test Conclusion
After undergoing fundamental environmental adaptability testing, the device fully complies with the basic requirements of the Chinese GB/T national standards and corresponding IEC standards, demonstrating stable operation in standard industrial environments.
The following results ensure the device meets a wide range of industrial application scenarios:
Low/High-Temperature Tests: Validates the device’s operational capability under basic industrial environmental conditions.
Vibration and Free Fall Tests: Ensures reliability during transportation and installation.
IP Test: Complies with fundamental protection requirements for industrial environments.

Overview

The ARMxy series ARM embedded computer BL370 series is an industrial-grade ARM controller with flexible I/O. It is designed with the Rockchip RK3562/RK3562J processor, featuringa quad-core ARM Cortex-A53 and a single-core ARM Cortex-M0, with a clock speed of up to 1.8GHz/2.0GHz. The BL370 series comes with 8/16/32GB eMMC, and various RAM and ROM combinations of 1/2/4GB LPDDR4X. It supports a rich set of I/O interfaces and is equipped with a built-in 1TOPS NPU for deep learning. The BL370 series is widely used in industries such as industrial control, edge computing, AIoT, artificial intelligence, communication management, AGV, machine vision inspection, robotics, industrial IoT gateways, energy storage systems, automation control, and transportation rail systems.

The BL370 series ARM embedded computer offers a variety of interfaces, including 1 - 3 optional 10/100M adaptive RJ45 ports, 2xUSB 2.0, 1 x HDMI 2.0, 1 X-series I/O board, and 2 Y-series I/O boards.These interfaces can be used for communication, PWM output, pulse counting, and other data acquisition and control tasks. The device supports 1080P@60fps H.264 video encoding and 4K@30fps H.265 video decoding. It also features a built-in Mini PCIe interface, supporting communication via Bluetooth, WiFi, 4G, and 5G modules.

The BL370 series ARM embedded computer supports various operating systems, including Linux-5.10.198, Linux-RT-5.10.198 kernel, Ubuntu 20.04, Debian 11 (bullseye) (planned), and Android 13 (planned). It also supports Docker containers, Node-RED, and Qt-5.15.2 for graphic interface development. Additionally, the device is compatible with the BLIoTLink industrial protocol conversion software for industrial data acquisition and conversion, enabling fast access to mainstream IoT cloud platforms and industrial SCADA configuration software. Remote access and maintenance can be performed through the BLRAT remote access tool, and Node-RED supports the rapid development of IoT applications.

The BL370 series ARM embedded computer has undergone professional electrical performance design and high/low-temperature testing validation. It can operate reliably and stably in harsh electromagnetic interference environments and a temperature range of -40 to 85°C. Thedevice is designed for DIN35 rail mounting, making it suitable for various industrial application environments.

The BL370 series ARM embedded computer offers a variety of interfaces, including 1 - 3 optional 10/100M adaptive RJ45 ports, 2xUSB 2.0, 1 x HDMI 2.0, 1 X-series I/O board, and 2 Y-series I/O boards.These interfaces can be used for communication, PWM output, pulse counting, and other data acquisition and control tasks. It also features a built-in Mini PCIe interface, supporting communication via Bluetooth, WiFi, 4G, and 5G modules.
The BL370 series ARM embedded computer supports various operating systems, including Linux-5.10.198, Linux-RT-5.10.198 kernel, Ubuntu 20.04, Debian 11 (bullseye) (planned), and Android 13 (planned). I/O Slot

Y-series I/O board slots: 2, supports Y-series I/O boards with RS485, CAN, RS232, RS422, DI, DO, relay output modules, AI, AO, PT100, PT1000, thermocouples, IEPE, and other interfaces.

P roduct S election
The ARMxy series ARM embedded controllers adopt a flexible design concept, allowing users to customize ROM and RAM combinations by choosing different System-on-Module(SOM) boards as needed. Additionally, various X and Y boards can be selected to achieve diverse IO configurations, catering to the requirements of different application scenarios.
P roduct naming convention
Host Model Number - SOM Model Number - X Board Model Number - Y1 Board Model Number - Y2 Board Model Number
For example, if we had a specific product configuration:
BL370-SOM370-X10
Indicates 1 Ethernet port, 8GB eMMC, 1GB LPDDR4X, and 2 RS485 ports.
If WiFi is required, add "W" to the host model number, e.g., BL370W-SOM370-X10.
If a 4G module is required, add "L" to the host model number, e.g., BL370L-SOM370-X10.

The ARMxy BL 41 0 series is a versatile industrial ARM controller designed for flexible I / O configuration. It is based on the Rockchip RK3568J/RK3568B2 processor, featuring aquad-core ARM Cortex-A55 architecture with clock speed up to 1.8GHz/2.0GHz. The device is equipped with 8/16/32GB eMMC storage and various combinations of 1/2/4GB LPDDR4X RAM. Additionally, it includes a built-in 1TOPS computing power Neural Processing Unit (NPU) for supporting deep learning tasks.
The BL 41 0 series ARM embedded computer offers a rich array of interfaces including

3 x 10/ 100M Ethernet ports , 2 x USB 2.0 ports , 1 x optional HDMI 2.0a port , 1 x optional X series IO board , 2 x optional Y series IO boards . These interfaces support various functions such as communication, PWM output, pulse counting, and data acquisition and control. The BL 41 0 also supports hardware decoding of 1080P @ 6 0fps videos.

Overview

The ARMxy BL 41 0 series is a versatile industrial ARM controller designed for flexible I / O configuration. It is based on the Rockchip RK3568J/RK3568B2 processor, featuring aquad-core ARM Cortex-A55 architecture with clock speed up to 1.8GHz/2.0GHz. The device is equipped with 8/16/32GB eMMC storage and various combinations of 1/2/4GB LPDDR4X RAM. Additionally, it includes a built-in 1TOPS computing power Neural Processing Unit (NPU) for supporting deep learning tasks.
The BL 41 0 series ARM embedded computer offers a rich array of interfaces including

3 x 10/ 100M Ethernet ports , 2 x USB 2.0 ports , 1 x optional HDMI 2.0a port , 1 x optional X series IO board , 2 x optional Y series IO boards . These interfaces support various functions such as communication, PWM output, pulse counting, and data acquisition and control. The BL 41 0 also supports hardware decoding of 1080P @ 6 0fps videos.
Additionally, it features a built-in Mini PCIe interface to support communication modules such as Bluetooth, WiFi, and 4G modules.

BL410 series ARM-based embedded computers support the Linux-5.10.209 and Linux-RT-5.10.209 kernels, as well as operating systems such as Ubuntu 20.04, Debian 10.13, and Android 13. They also support Docker containers, Node-Red, and graphical user interface development tools like Qt-5.15.2. In addition , BL 41 0 is compatible with BLIoTLink industrial protocol conversion software for data collection and transformation , and can s eamlessintegration with various mainstream IoT cloud platforms and industrial SCADA software . Users can leverage the BLRAT for remote access and maintenance of the BL 41 0 embedded computer. Additionally, with support for Node-Red, users can rapidly develop IoT applications on the BL 41 0.

The BL 41 0 series ARM embedded computer has undergone rigorous electrical performance design and high-low temperature testing to ensure stability and reliability. It is designed for DIN35 rail mounting, making it suitable for various industrial application environments.
This embedded computer is widely used in industrial IoT, photovoltaic power generation and energy storage systems, automation control, and transportation and rail applications.

P roduct S election
The ARMxy series ARM embedded controllers adopt a flexible design concept, allowing users to customizeROM and RAM combinations by choosing different System-on-Module(SOM) boards as needed. Additionally, various X and Y boards can be selected to achieve diverse IO configurations, catering to the requirements of different application scenarios.
P roduct naming convention
Host Model Number - SOM Model Number - X Board Model Number - Y1 Board ModelNumber - Y2 Board Model Number
For example, if we had a specific product configuration:
Host Model : BL 41 0
SOM Model: SOM 41 0
X Board Model: X 10
The complete product name would be:
BL 41 0 - SOM 41 0 -X 10
Means 1 Ethernet port, 8GB eMMC storage, LPDDR4X is 1GByte, and 2 RS485
If you need to add WiFi, then you would append "W" to the host model number.
For example: BL 41 0 W -SOM 41 0-X10
If you need to add a 4G module, you would append "L" to the host model number.
For example: BL 41 0L-SOM 41 0-X10

Overview

The ARMxy series ARM embedded computer BL440 series is an industrial-grade ARM controller with flexible I/O configuration. It is designed based on the Rockchip RK3576J/RK3576 processor, featuring a quad-core ARM Cortex-A72, a quad-core ARM Cortex-A53, and a single-core ARM Cortex-M0, with a clock speed of up to 2.1G/2.2GHz. The device comes with various RAM and ROM configurations, including 16/32/64GByte eMMC and 2/4/8GByte LPDDR4X. It supports a wide range of I/O interfaces and integrates a built-in 6TOPS NPU for deep learning applications. The BL440 series is widely used in industrial control, edge computing, AIoT, artificial intelligence, communication management, AGV robots, machine vision inspection, robotics, industrial IoT gateways, energy storage systems, automation control, and railway transportation.

The BL440 series ARM embedded computer provides 1 to 3 optional RJ-45 network ports, including 2x10/100/1000M adaptive network ports and 1x10/100M network port. It also features 2xUSB3.2, 1 optional HDMI2.1, 1 optional X-series I/O board, and 2 optional Y-series I/O boards, offering rich interfaces for communication, PWM output, pulse counting, and data acquisition and control. Additionally, it supports 4K@ 12 0fps H.26 5 video encoding and 8K@30fps H.265 video decoding. The device is equipped with a Mini PCIe interface, supporting Bluetooth, WiFi, 4G, and 5G module communication.

The BL440 series supports operating systems such as Linux-6.1. 11 5, Linux-RT-6.1. 11 5, Ubuntu 22.04. It also supports Docker containers, Node-Red, and graphical interface development tools like Qt-5.15.11. Moreover, it is compatible with the BLIoTLink for built-in gateway features . Remote access and maintenance can be achieved through the BLRAT remote access tool , and QuickConfig for quick configuration, system management . The device also supports Node-Red for rapid IoT application development.

Designed with professional electrical performance and verified through high and low-temperature testing, the BL440 series ARM embedded computer can operate stably and reliably under harsh electromagnetic interference conditions and temperatures ranging from -40°C to 85°C. It supports DIN35 rail mounting, making it suitable for various industrial application environments.

Additionally, it supports 4K@ 12 0fps H.26 5 video encoding and 8K@30fps H.265 video decoding. The device is equipped with a Mini PCIe interface, supporting Bluetooth, WiFi, 4G, and 5G module communication.

The BL440 series supports operating systems such as Linux-6.1. 11 5, Linux-RT-6.1. 11 5, Ubuntu 22.04. It also supports Docker containers, Node-Red, and graphical interface development tools like Qt-5.15.11. Moreover, it is compatible with the BLIoTLink for built-in gateway features . Remote access and maintenance can be achieved through the BLRAT remote access tool , and QuickConfig for quick configuration, system management . The device also supports Node-Red for rapid IoT application development.

Designed with professional electrical performance and verified through high and low-temperature testing, the BL440 series ARM embedded computer can operate stably and reliably under harsh electromagnetic interference conditions and temperatures ranging from -40°C to 85°C. It supports DIN35 rail mounting, making it suitable for various industrial application environments.

Overview
The ARMxy series ARM embedded computer BL440 series is an industrial-grade ARM controller with flexible I/O configuration. It is designed based on the Rockchip RK3576J/RK3576 processor, featuring a quad-core ARM Cortex-A72, a quad-core ARM Cortex-A53, and a single-core ARM Cortex-M0, with a clock speed of up to 2.1G/2.2GHz. The device comes with various RAM and ROM configurations, including 16/32/64GByte eMMC and 2/4/8GByte LPDDR4X. It supports a wide range of I/O interfaces and integrates a built-in 6TOPS NPU for deep learning applications. The BL440 series is widely used in industrial control, edge computing, AIoT, artificial intelligence, communication management, AGV robots, machine vision inspection, robotics, industrial IoT gateways, energy storage systems, automation control, and railway transportation.
The BL440 series ARM embedded computer provides 1 to 3 optional RJ-45 network ports, including 2x10/100/1000M adaptive network ports and 1x10/100M network port. It also features 2xUSB3.2, 1 optional HDMI2.1, 1 optional X-series I/O board, and 2 optional Y-series I/O boards, offering rich interfaces for communication, PWM output, pulse counting, and data acquisition and control. Additionally, it supports 4K@ 12 0fps H.26 5 video encoding and 8K@30fps H.265 video decoding. The device is equipped with a Mini PCIe interface, supporting Bluetooth, WiFi, 4G, and 5G module communication.
The BL440 series supports operating systems such as Linux-6.1. 11 5, Linux-RT-6.1. 11 5, Ubuntu 22.04. It also supports Docker containers, Node-Red, and graphical interface development tools like Qt-5.15.11. Moreover, it is compatible with the BLIoTLink for built-in gateway features . Remote access and maintenance can be achieved through the BLRAT remote access tool , and QuickConfig for quick configuration, system management . The device also supports Node-Red for rapid IoT application development.
Designed with professional electrical performance and verified through high and low-temperature testing, the BL440 series ARM embedded computer can operate stably and reliably under harsh electromagnetic interference conditions and temperatures ranging from -40°C to 85°C. It supports DIN35 rail mounting, making it suitable for various industrial application environments.

P roduct S election
The ARMxy series ARM embedded controllers adopt a flexible design concept, allowing users to customizeROM and RAM combinations by choosing different System-on-Module(SOM) boards as needed. Additionally, various X and Y boards can be selected to achieve diverse IO configurations, catering to the requirements of different application scenarios.
P roduct naming convention
Host Model Number - SOM Model Number - X Board Model Number - Y1 Board ModelNumber - Y2 Board Model Number
For example, if we had a specific product configuration:
BL 44 0 - SOM 44 0 -X 10
Means 1 Ethernet port, 16 GB eMMC storage, LPDDR4X is 2 GByte, and 2 RS485
If you need to add WiFi, then you would append "W" to the host model number.
For example: BL 44 0 W -SOM 44 0-X10
If you need to add a 4G module, you would append "L" to the host model number.
For example: BL 44 0L-SOM 4 0-X10

Test Conclusion
After undergoing fundamental environmental adaptability testing, the device fully complies with the basic requirements of the Chinese GB/T national standards and corresponding IEC standards, demonstrating stable operation in standard industrial environments.
The following results ensure the device meets a wide range of industrial application scenarios:
Low/High-Temperature Tests: Validates the device’s operational capability under basic industrial environmental conditions.
Vibration and Free Fall Tests: Ensures reliability during transportation and installation.
IP Test: Complies with fundamental protection requirements for industrial environments.

Overview

BL450 Series ARM Embedded Computer is an industrial-grade ARM controller with flexible I/O configuration, based on the Rockchip RK3588J/RK3588 processor, featuring a quad-core ARM Cortex-A76 + quad-core ARM Cortex-A55 + triple-core ARM Cortex-M0 architecture, witha clock speed of up to 2.0G/2.4GHz. It is equipped with 32GB/64GB/128GB eMMC and 4GB/8GB/16GB LPDDR4X RAM and ROM configurations. Supporting a rich set of I/O interfaces, it also integrates a 6TOPS NPU, enabling deep learning capabilities. The BL450 series iswidely used in industrial control, edge computing, AIoT, artificial intelligence, communication management, AGV robots, machine vision inspection, robotics, industrial IoT gateways, energy storage systems, automation control, and transportation infrastructure.

BL450 Series ARM Embedded Computer offers 1 to 3 optional RJ-45 network ports, including two 10/100/1000M ports and one 10/100M adaptive port, along with 2×USB 3.1, one optional HDMI 2.1, and optional X-series and Y-series I/O boards for communication, PWM output, pulse counting, and other data acquisition and control functions. It supports 8K@30fps H.264 video encoding and 8K@60fps H.265 video decoding. Built-in Mini PCIe interface allows support for Bluetooth, WiFi, 4G, and 5G communication modules.

BL450 Series supports multiple operating systems, including Linux-5.10.209, Linux-RT-5.10.209, Ubuntu 20.04, Debian 11, and Android 13. It is also compatible with Docker containers, Node-Red, and Qt-5.15.10 for graphical development. The BLIoTLink industrial protocol conversion software enables fast industrial data acquisition and conversion, facilitating seamless integration with mainstream IoT cloud platforms and industrial SCADA software. Additionally, the BLRAT remote access tool provides remote access and maintenance, while Node-Red allows for rapid IoT application development.

Designed with professional electrical performance and high/low-temperature testing, the BL450 series operates reliably under harsh electromagnetic interference and extreme temperatures ranging from -40°C to 85°C. With DIN35 rail mounting, it is suitable for various industrial applications.

Designed with professional electrical performance and high/low-temperature testing, the BL450 series operates reliably under harsh electromagnetic interference and extreme temperatures ranging from -40°C to 85°C. With DIN35 rail mounting, it is suitable for various industrial applications.

P roduct S election
The ARMxy series ARM embedded controllers adopt a flexible design concept, allowing users to customizeROM and RAM combinations by choosing different System-on-Module(SOM) boards as needed. Additionally, various X and Y boards can be selected to achieve diverse IO configurations, catering to the requirements of different application scenarios.
P roduct naming convention
Host Model Number - SOM Model Number - X Board Model Number - Y1 Board ModelNumber - Y2 Board Model Number
For example, if we had a specific product configuration:
BL 45 0 - SOM 45 0 -X 10
Means 1 Ethernet port, 32 GB eMMC storage, 4 GB LPDDR4X, and 2 RS485 ports
If you need to add WiFi, then you would append "W" to the host model number.
For example: BL 45 0 W -SOM 45 0-X10
If you need to add a 4G module, you would append "L" to the host model number.
For example: BL 45 0L-SOM 45 0-X10

After undergoing fundamental environmental adaptability testing, the device fully complies with the basic requirements of the Chinese GB/T national standards and corresponding IEC standards, demonstrating stable operation in standard industrial environments.

Low/High-Temperature Tests: Validates the device’s operational capability under basic industrial environmental conditions.
Vibration and Free Fall Tests: Ensures reliability during transportation and installation.
IP Test: Complies with fundamental protection requirements for industrial environments.

Overview

The BL460 s eries from the ARMxy family is an industrial-grade ARM controller based on the Broadcom BCM2712 quad-core Cortex-A76 processor (up to 2.4GHz). It offers flexible configurations with up to 64GB eMMC and 16GB LPDDR4X RAM, and rich I/O options including 1–3 Ethernet ports, USB 3.0, HDMI, M.2, Mini PCIe, and expandable X/Y series I/O boards.

Compatible with the Raspberry Pi ecosystem, the BL460 supports Linux, Raspberry Pi OS, Docker, Node-Red, and Qt, enabling fast development and cross-platform integration. It also supports BLIoTLink for industrial data acquisition and protocol conversion, BLRAT for remote access, and the QuickConfig tool for easy setup.

Designed for edge computing, industrial control, IoT gateways, and smart automation, the BL460 operates reliably in -20°C to +85°C environments and supports DIN-rail mounting for industrial applications.

Rapid Development Tool
QuickConfig enables fast configuration and efficient system management. It also supports AI-assisted application development and intuitive “what-you-see-is-what-you-get” programming, accelerating the creation of intelligent industrialsolutions.
P rotocol C onversion S oftware
BLIoTLink software s upports protocol conversion (Modbus,PLC, BACnet, IEC104, MQTT, OPC UA) and integration with major IoT/SCADA platforms such as AWS IoT Core, ThingsBoard, Ignition, Alibaba Cloud IoT, and Huawei IoT.
R emote A ccess T ool
BLRAT enables secure remote device access, allowing convenient remote operation and maintenance.
Other Software
Node-Red , Python , Docker , C# , MySQL , SQLite
40-pin Expansion Board
Using the WiringPi hardware control library, the 40-pin GPIO pins can be controlled easily, quickly, and intuitively .
Note:
When using the 40-pin expansion board, the enclosure provided by our company cannot be used.
GPIO14 and GPIO15 are multiplexed for the mainboard debug port.
GPIO2 and GPIO17 are multiplexed for the RUN and network indicator LEDs.
GPIO6 and ID_SD are multiplexed for the hardware watchdog.
Modifying these GPIOs will cause the above functions to fail. Therefore, it is not recommended to use the 40-pin expansion board together with the X board or Y board.
When used together with the X board:
The X board shares GPIO3, 4, 5, 7, 12, 13, 16, 22, 23, 24, 25, and 27 with the 40-pin pins. Using both boards will interfere with the state of these GPIOs.
When used together with the Y board:
Slot 1 shares GPIO8, 9, 10, 11, and ID_SC.
Slot 2 shares GPIO1, 18, 19, 20, 21, and 26.
Modifying any of these GPIOs will cause the connection with the Y board to fail.
P roduct S election
The ARMxy series ARM embedded controllers adopt a flexible design concept, allowing users to customize ROM and RAM combinations by choosing different System-on-Module(SOM) boards as needed. Additionally, various X and Y boards can be selected to achieve diverse IO configurations, catering to the requirements of different application scenarios.
P roduct naming convention
Host Model Number - SOM Model Number - X Board Model Number - Y1 Board ModelNumber - Y2 Board Model Number
For example, if we had a specific product configuration:
BL 461 -CM5016032-X 10
Means 2 Ethernet port, 32 GB eMMC storage, 16 GB LPDDR4X, and 4 RS485 ports
If you need to add a 4G module, you would append "L" to the host model number.
For example: BL 461L -CM5016032-X 10

Test Conclusion
After undergoing fundamental environmental adaptability testing, the device fully complies with the basic requirements of the Chinese GB/T national standards and corresponding IEC standards, demonstrating stable operation in standard industrial environments.
The following results ensure the device meets a wide range of industrial application scenarios:
Low/High-Temperature Tests: Validates the device’s operational capability under basic industrial environmental conditions.
Vibration and Free Fall Tests: Ensures reliability during transportation and installation.
IP Test: Complies with fundamental protection requirements for industrial environments.

Overview

Building HVAC Edge Gateway BA116 Series is an easy-to-use, high-performance building HVAC IoT gateway. It is equipped with a dual-core Cortex A7 processor, and can quickly collect data from up to 10,000 data points.

The BA116 Series adopts a building HVAC-grade design, with an onboard independent hardware watchdog and electrical isolation technology. It has passed EMC, EMI tests and has been validated for high and low-temperature performance in the range of -4 0 °C to 8 5 °C, ensuring stable long-term operation in harsh environments.

Overview

Building HVAC Edge Gateway BA116 Series is an easy-to-use, high-performance building HVAC IoT gateway. It is equipped with a dual-core Cortex A7 processor, and can quickly collect data from up to 10,000 data points.

The BA116 Series adopts a building HVAC-grade design, with an onboard independent hardware watchdog and electrical isolation technology. It has passed EMC, EMI tests and has been validated for high and low-temperature performance in the range of -4 0 °C to 8 5 °C, ensuring stable long-term operation in harsh environments.

BA116 Series provides 4/8 isolated RS485/232 serial ports, supports WiFi, 4G network communications, routing functionality, OpenVPN support, TLS/SSL encryption, and remote firmware upgrade functionality. BA116 Series can achieve remote PLC program downloads, PLC data acquisition, instrumentdata collection,and integration with various cloud platforms and digital platforms, providing reliable solutions for smart building HVAC and refrigeration (HVAC) systems. It is widely used in smart buildings, HVAC and refrigeration solutions, and digital transformation scenarios.
Key Features:

Powerful Performance: Dual-core Cortex-A7 processor with up to 1.2GHz clock speed High-speed acquisition of 10,000 data points; collects 1,000 data points in just 1.5 seconds Independent hardware watchdog + EMC/EMI anti-interference design for long-term stable operation
Supports expandable SD card to enhance historical data storage performance.
Integrated routing + data acquisition + protocol conversion for high system integration Industrial-Grade Reliability

Wide operating temperature range from -4 0 °C to 8 5 °C, adaptable to extreme environments Titanium metal casing, corrosion-resistant and anti-electromagnetic interference Electrical isolation + TLS/SSL encryption to ensure data security
Comprehensive Protocol Compatibility for Seamless Connectivity
Downlink: Siemens, Mitsubishi, Omron, Delta and other brands of PLCs, Modbus RTU, Modbus TCP, DL/T645, IEC104, BACnet/IP, BACnet MS/TP protocols, etc.

Uplink: BACnet/IP, BACnet MS/TP , MQTT, OPC UA, Huawei Cloud IoT, AWS IoT Core, Alibaba Cloud IoT, Modbus RTU, Modbus TCP, Thingsboard, BEILAI Cloud, Ignition SCADA, etc. Smart O&M, Efficient Management Remote PLC program downloads to reduce on-site maintenance
OpenVPN + secure encryption to ensure safe remote communication Remote parameter configuration and firmware upgrades to improve efficiency

Overview
Building HVAC Edge Gateway BA116 Series is an easy-to-use, high-performance building HVAC IoT gateway. It is equipped with a dual-core Cortex A7 processor, and can quickly collect data from up to 10,000 data points.
The BA116 Series adopts a building HVAC-grade design, with an onboard independent hardware watchdog and electrical isolation technology. It has passed EMC, EMI tests and has been validated for high and low-temperature performance in the range of -4 0 °C to 8 5 °C, ensuring stable long-term operation in harsh environments.
BA116 Series provides 4/8 isolated RS485/232 serial ports, supports WiFi, 4G network communications, routing functionality, OpenVPN support, TLS/SSL encryption, and remote firmware upgrade functionality.
BA116 Series can achieve remote PLC program downloads, PLC data acquisition, instrumentdata collection,and integration with various cloud platforms and digital platforms, providing reliable solutions for smart building HVAC and refrigeration (HVAC) systems. It is widely used in smart buildings, HVAC and refrigeration solutions, and digital transformation scenarios.
Key Features:
Powerful Performance:
Dual-core Cortex-A7 processor with up to 1.2GHz clock speed
High-speed acquisition of 10,000 data points; collects 1,000 data points in just 1.5 seconds
Independent hardware watchdog + EMC/EMI anti-interference design for long-term stable operation
512MB RAM and 8GB eMMC
Supports expandable SD card to enhance historical data storage performance.
Integrated routing + data acquisition + protocol conversion for high system integration
Industrial-Grade Reliability
Wide operating temperature range from -4 0 °C to 8 5 °C, adaptable to extreme environments
Titanium metal casing, corrosion-resistant and anti-electromagnetic interference
Electrical isolation + TLS/SSL encryption to ensure data security
Comprehensive Protocol Compatibility for Seamless Connectivity
Downlink: Siemens, Mitsubishi, Omron, Delta and other brands of PLCs, Modbus RTU, Modbus TCP, DL/T645, IEC104, BACnet/IP, BACnet MS/TP protocols, etc.
Uplink: BACnet/IP, BACnet MS/TP , MQTT, OPC UA, Huawei Cloud IoT, AWS IoT Core, Alibaba Cloud IoT, Modbus RTU, Modbus TCP, Thingsboard, BEILAI Cloud, Ignition SCADA, etc.
Smart O&M, Efficient Management
Remote PLC program downloads to reduce on-site maintenance
OpenVPN + secure encryption to ensure safe remote communication
Remote parameter configuration and firmware upgrades to improve efficiency
Flexible Communication Options
Communication Ports: 4/8 isolated RS485/232
Dual Ethernet ports + WiFi/4G wireless communication
Typical Application Areas
Smart Buildings: PLC Data Acquisition + MES/SCADA System Integration
Energy Management: Aggregation of data from electricity meters, water meters, and sensors to the cloud
Smart HVAC: Distributed Device Monitoring and Remote Maintenance

Overview

The Energy and Power Edge Gateway BE116 Series is an easy-to-use, high-performance energy and power IoT gateway. It is equipped with a dual-core Cortex A7 processor, and can quickly collect data from up to 10,000 data points.

BE116 Series adopts an industrial-grade design, with an onboard independent hardware watchdog and electrical isolation technology. It has passed EMC, EMI tests and has been validated for high and low-temperature performance in the range of -4 0 °C to 8 5 °C, ensuring stablelong-term operation in harsh environments.

Overview

The Energy and Power Edge Gateway BE116 Series is an easy-to-use, high-performance energy and power IoT gateway. It is equipped with a dual-core Cortex A7 processor, and can quickly collect data from up to 10,000 data points.

BE116 Series adopts an industrial-grade design, with an onboard independent hardware watchdog and electrical isolation technology. It has passed EMC, EMI tests and has been validated for high and low-temperature performance in the range of -4 0 °C to 8 5 °C, ensuring stablelong-term operation in harsh environments.

BE116 Series provides 4/8 isolated RS485/232 serial ports, supports WiFi, 4G network communications, routing functionality, OpenVPN support, TLS/SSL encryption, and remote firmware upgrade functionality.

BE116 Series can achieve remote PLC program downloads, PLC data acquisition, instrumentdata collection, and integration with various cloud platforms and digital platforms, providing reliable solutions for smart energy. It is widely used in smart energy, industrial and commercial energy storage solutions, and digital transformation scenarios.
Key Features:

Powerful Performance: Dual-core Cortex-A7 processor with up to 1.2GHz clock speed High-speed acquisition of 10,000 data points; collects 1,000 data points in just 1.5 seconds Independent hardware watchdog + EMC/EMI anti-interference design for long-term stable operation
Supports expandable SD card to enhance historical data storage performance.
Integrated routing + data acquisition + protocol conversion for high system integration Industrial-Grade Reliability

Wide operating temperature range from -4 0 °C to 8 5 °C, adaptable to extreme environments Titanium metal casing, corrosion-resistant and anti-electromagnetic interference Electrical isolation + TLS/SSL encryption to ensure data security
Comprehensive Protocol Compatibility for Seamless Connectivity
Downlink: Siemens, Mitsubishi, Omron, Delta and other brands of PLCs, Modbus RTU, Modbus TCP, DL/T645, IEC104, BACnet/IP, BACnet MS/TP protocols, etc.

Uplink: IEC104, MQTT, OPC UA, Huawei Cloud IoT, AWS IoT Core, Alibaba Cloud IoT, Modbus RTU, Modbus TCP, Thingsboard, BEILAI Cloud, Ignition SCADA, etc. Smart O&M, Efficient Management Remote PLC program downloads to reduce on-site maintenance

Overview
The Energy and Power Edge Gateway BE116 Series is an easy-to-use, high-performance energy and power IoT gateway. It is equipped with a dual-core Cortex A7 processor, and can quickly collect data from up to 10,000 data points.
BE116 Series adopts an industrial-grade design, with an onboard independent hardware watchdog and electrical isolation technology. It has passed EMC, EMI tests and has been validated for high and low-temperature performance in the range of -4 0 °C to 8 5 °C, ensuring stablelong-term operation in harsh environments.
BE116 Series provides 4/8 isolated RS485/232 serial ports, supports WiFi, 4G network communications, routing functionality, OpenVPN support, TLS/SSL encryption, and remote firmware upgrade functionality.
BE116 Series can achieve remote PLC program downloads, PLC data acquisition, instrumentdata collection, and integration with various cloud platforms and digital platforms, providing reliable solutions for smart energy. It is widely used in smart energy, industrial and commercial energy storage solutions, and digital transformation scenarios.
Key Features:
Powerful Performance:
Dual-core Cortex-A7 processor with up to 1.2GHz clock speed

Dual Ethernet ports + WiFi/4G wireless communication

Smart Energy: PLC Data Acquisition + MES/SCADA System Integration

Smart Energy Storage: Distributed Device Monitoring and Remote Maintenance

Overview
BL116 IIoT Edge Gateway is a user-friendly, high-performance industrial gateway built with a dual-core Cortex-A7 processor. It can rapidly collect up to 10,000 data points.

Designed with industrial-grade standards, the BL116 Series features an independent hardware watchdog and electrical isolation technology. It has passed EMC and EMI testing, as well as high and low-temperature validation from -4 0 °C to 8 5 °C, ensuring long-term stable operation even in harsh environments.

Overview
BL116 IIoT Edge Gateway is a user-friendly, high-performance industrial gateway built with a dual-core Cortex-A7 processor. It can rapidly collect up to 10,000 data points.

Designed with industrial-grade standards, the BL116 Series features an independent hardware watchdog and electrical isolation technology. It has passed EMC and EMI testing, as well as high and low-temperature validation from -4 0 °C to 8 5 °C, ensuring long-term stable operation even in harsh environments.

BL116 Series High-Performance IIoT Edge gateway provides 4/8 isolated-protected RS485/232 serial ports, supports WiFi, 4G, and 5G network communication, offers routing capabilities, supports OpenVPN functionality, TLS/SSL encryption, and remote firmware upgrades.

BL116 Series enables remote PLC program downloads, PLC data acquisition, and data collection from various instrumentation devices. It can connect to a wide range of cloud platforms, digital platforms. It offers a reliable solution for Industrial IoT (IIoT) applications and is widely used in smart factories, smart energy, smart cities, smart transportation, and other industrial IoT and digital transformation scenarios.

Powerful Performance: Dual-core Cortex-A7 processor with up to 1.2GHz clock speed High-speed acquisition of 10,000 data points; collects 1,000 data points in just 1.5 seconds Independent hardware watchdog + EMC/EMI anti-interference design for long-term stable operation

Overview

The BL118 Series is an industrial-grade, high-performance, scalable, and customizable industrial IoT gateway that comes pre-installed with the Node-RED visual programming environment. It is equipped with a dual-core Cortex-A7 processor and offers flexible configurations for RAM, ROM, and I/O interfaces, supporting WiFi, 4G network communications. It is widely used in smart factories, smart energy, smart cities, smart transportation, and other industrial IoTsolutions, as well as in industrial visualization and digital transformation scenarios.

BL118 Series adopts an industrial-grade design with an onboard independent hardware watchdog and electrical isolation technology. It has passed EMC/EMI tests and has been validated for high and low-temperature performance in the range of -45°C to 80°C, ensuring stable long-term operation in harsh environments.
BL118 Series provides 4/8 isolated RS485/232/CAN serial ports, as well as expandable GPIO, DI, DO, AI, AO, RTD, TC, and other interfaces.

BL118 Series comes pre-installed with the Node-RED visual programming environment, supporting various PLC protocols from major brands, Modbus RTU/ASCII, TCP/IP, BACnet, CAN, OPC UA, MQTT, HTTP, WebSocket, and other industrial protocols. With an easy drag-and-drop node programming approach and an open operating system environment, it is convenientfor customers to carry out secondary development and functional expansion, providing reliable solutions for Industrial IoT (IIoT).
Key Features:
Powerful Performance Dual-core Cortex-A7 processor, with a clock speed of up to 1.2GHz Independent hardware watchdog + EMC/EMI anti-interference design, ensuring stable long-term operation
Optional 512M/1G memory and 4G/8G Flash storage
Supports expandable SD card for enhanced historical data storage Pre-installed Node-RED environment, supports Ubuntu 20.04 system
Supports Gigabit + 100M Ethernet port, expandable WiFi/4G wireless network Provides 4/8 isolated RS485/232/CAN, 2×USB2.0
Supports GPIO/DI/DO/AI/AO/RTD/TC expansion I/O interfaces No-Code Development Platform Pre-installed B LIIOT customized Node-RED, drag-and-drop programming

Built-in industrial protocol node libraries for Modbus/PLC/MQTT Provides BLRAT remote maintenance tool, supports unmanned operation S imple development, visual workflow orchestration, no coding experience required

Overview
The BL118 Series is an industrial-grade, high-performance, scalable, and customizable industrial IoT gateway that comes pre-installed with the Node-RED visual programming environment. It is equipped with a dual-core Cortex-A7 processor and offers flexible configurations for RAM, ROM, and I/O interfaces, supporting WiFi, 4G network communications. It is widely used in smart factories, smart energy, smart cities, smart transportation, and other industrial IoTsolutions, as well as in industrial visualization and digital transformation scenarios.
BL118 Series adopts an industrial-grade design with an onboard independent hardware watchdog and electrical isolation technology. It has passed EMC/EMI tests and has been validated for high and low-temperature performance in the range of -45°C to 80°C, ensuring stable long-term operation in harsh environments.
BL118 Series provides 4/8 isolated RS485/232/CAN serial ports, as well as expandable GPIO, DI, DO, AI, AO, RTD, TC, and other interfaces.
BL118 Series comes pre-installed with the Node-RED visual programming environment, supporting various PLC protocols from major brands, Modbus RTU/ASCII, TCP/IP, BACnet, CAN, OPC UA, MQTT, HTTP, WebSocket, and other industrial protocols. With an easy drag-and-drop node programming approach and an open operating system environment, it is convenientfor customers to carry out secondary development and functional expansion, providing reliable solutions for Industrial IoT (IIoT).
Key Features:
Powerful Performance
Dual-core Cortex-A7 processor, with a clock speed of up to 1.2GHz
Independent hardware watchdog + EMC/EMI anti-interference design, ensuring stable long-term operation
Optional 512M/1G memory and 4G/8G Flash storage
Supports expandable SD card for enhanced historical data storage
Pre-installed Node-RED environment, supports Ubuntu 20.04 system
Supports Gigabit + 100M Ethernet port, expandable WiFi/4G wireless network
Provides 4/8 isolated RS485/232/CAN, 2×USB2.0
Supports GPIO/DI/DO/AI/AO/RTD/TC expansion I/O interfaces
No-Code Development Platform
Pre-installed B LIIOT customized Node-RED, drag-and-drop programming
Built-in industrial protocol node libraries for Modbus/PLC/MQTT
Provides BLRAT remote maintenance tool, supports unmanned operation
S imple development, visual workflow orchestration, no coding experience required
Real-time debugging interface for quick logic verification
Over 5000 official + third-party nodes
Supports Docker container deployment
Built-in support for MQTT/OPC UA/Modbus/PLC protocols
Expandable Web dashboard (charts/widgets/real-time data) for industrial visualization
Typical Application Areas
Smart Factory: PLC Data Acquisition + MES/SCADA System Integration and Industrial Visualization
Energy Management: Aggregation of electricity meters, water meters, and sensor data to thecloud
Smart City: Distributed Device Monitoring and Remote Maintenance

P roduct S election
The Node-Red IIoT Gateways adopt a flexible design concept, allowing users to customizeROM and RAM combinations by choosing different System-on-Module(SOM) boards as needed. Additionally, various X and Y boards can be selected to achieve diverse IO configurations,catering to the requirements of different application scenarios.
P roduct naming convention
Host Model Number - SOM Model Number - X Board Model Number - Y1 Board ModelNumber - Y2 Board Model Number
For example : BL118 - SOM334 -X 1
BL118 indicates 2 Ethernet ports, 2 USB 2.0 ports, an X-board with 2x5PIN, and no Y-board; SOM33 4 indicates 8 GB eMMC, 512MB DDR4, and a wide temperature range of -20~70℃; X1 indicates that the X-board features 4 RS485 ports.
If you need to add WiFi, then you would append "W" to the host model number.
For example: BL 118W -SOM 334 -X 1
If you need to add a 4G module, you would append "L" to the host model number.
For example: BL 118 L-SOM 334 -X 1

D ownlink support s Modbus RTU Master , Modbus TCP Master U plink suppor ts BACnet/IP, BACnet MS/TP Supports up to 10 devices with 512 data points collected. A dopts embedded ARM MCU, and developed based on Linux OS system . C omes with 2 RS485/RS232 serial ports, 1 power input, 2 Ethernet ports and 2 USB ports. WiFi or Ethernet ports to access the Internet Remote configuration, remote firmware upgrade for easy remote maintenance. Adopt s BLIIOT's patented rail-clip technology, supports standard DIN35 rail mounting and wall mounting.

DC 9-36V wide power voltage input with wiring terminal. Anti-reverse connection protection ; 2 channel RS485/RS232 ; Serial ports support 2400bps-115200bps baud rate; 1, 2 bits stop bit ; 7, 8 bits data bit ; None, Odd, Even parity bit; 2 channel RJ45 ports(1 WAN and 1 LAN). Data can be collected from devices connected to WAN and LAN port or cascaded switch devices. Comes with link and data indicators. Built-in isolation transformer with up to 2KV electromagnetic insulation. Supports remote configuration and remote firmware upgrade; Supports the reporting of CPU usage, memory usage, and disk usage, Ethernet port device s , serial port device s , etc. Supports routing functions and cascading switch data acquisition ; Supports OpenVPN ; Supports Modbus RTU to Modbus TCP, transparent transmission; Use RESET button to restore factory settings (long press in power-on state until RUN indicator goes out); Supports hardware and software watchdogs ; Dimension 30mmx83mmx110mm, DIN rail mounting or wall mounting.

D ownlink support s Various air conditioning protocols, Modbus RTU Master , Modbus TCP Master U plink suppor ts BACnet/IP, BACnet MS/TP Supports up to 50 devices with 4000 data points collected. A dopts embedded ARM MCU, and developed based on Linux OS system . C omes with 6 RS485/RS232 serial ports, 1 power input, 2 Ethernet ports and 2 USB ports. WiFi or Ethernet ports to access the Internet Remote configuration, remote firmware upgrade for easy remote maintenance. Adopt s BLIIOT's patented rail-clip technology, supports standard DIN35 rail mounting and wall mounting.

Features

DC 9-36V wide power voltage input with wiring terminal. Anti-reverse connection protection ; 6 channel RS485/RS232 ; Serial ports support 2400bps-115200bps baud rate; 1, 2 bits stop bit ; 7, 8 bits data bit ; None, Odd, Even parity bit; 2 channel RJ45 ports(1 WAN and 1 LAN). Data can be collected from devices connected to WAN and LAN port or cascaded switch devices. Comes with link and data indicators. Built-in isolation transformer with up to 2KV electromagnetic insulation. Supports remote configuration and remote firmware upgrade; Supports the reporting of CPU usage, memory usage, and disk usage, Ethernet port device s , serial port device s , etc. Supports routing functions and cascading switch data acquisition ; Supports OpenVPN ; Supports Modbus RTU to Modbus TCP, transparent transmission; Use RESET button to restore factory settings (long press in power-on state until RUN indicator goes out); Supports hardware and software watchdogs ; Dimension 4 0mmx83mmx110mm, DIN rail mounting or wall mounting.

D ownlink support s BACnet/IP, BACnet MS/TP, Modbus RTU Master, Modbus TCP Master U plink suppor ts Modbus RTU, Modbus TCP Supports up to 10 devices with 512 data points collected. A dopts embedded ARM MCU, and developed based on Linux OS system . Data can be collected from devices connected to WAN and LAN port or cascaded switch devices. Comes with link and data indicators. A dopts embedded ARM MCU, and developed based on Linux OS system . D ownlink support s Modbus RTU Master, Modbus TCP Master , DL/T645, IEC104 U plink suppor ts Modbus RTU, Modbus TCP Supports up to 50 devices with 4000 data points collected. A dopts embedded ARM MCU, and developed based on Linux OS system . C omes with 6 RS485/RS232 serial ports, 1 power input, 2 Ethernet ports and 2 USB ports. 4G, WiFi or Ethernet ports to access the Internet Remote configuration, remote firmware upgrade for easy remote maintenance. Adopt s BLIIOT's patented rail-clip technology, supports standard DIN35 rail mounting and wall mounting.

Features

DC 9-36V wide power voltage input with wiring terminal. Anti-reverse connection protection ; 6 channel RS485/RS232 ; Serial ports support 2400bps-115200bps baud rate; 1, 2 bits stop bit ; 7, 8 bits data bit ; None, Odd, Even parity bit; 2 channel RJ45 ports(1 WAN and 1 LAN). Data can be collected from devices connected to WAN and LAN port or cascaded switch devices. Comes with link and data indicators. Built-in isolation transformer with up to 2KV electromagnetic insulation. Supports remote configuration and remote firmware upgrade; Supports the reporting of CPU usage, memory usage, disk usage , Ethernet port device s , serial port device s , 4G signal, etc. Supports routing functions and cascading switch data acquisition ; Supports 4G function and can set APN parameters; When connecting to the external network, it will prioritize wired Internet access and switch to 4G network when there is no wired network; Supports OpenVPN ; Supports Modbus RTU to Modbus TCP, Modbus TCP to Modbus RTU, transparent transmission; Use RESET button to restore factory settings (long press in power-on state until RUN indicator goes out); Supports hardware and software watchdogs ; Dimension 4 0mmx83mmx110mm, DIN rail mounting or wall mounting.

preview_paragraphs: Modbus to IEC61850 GATEWAY dATA sHEET Modbus to IEC61850 GATEWAY dATA sHEET
Modbus to IEC61850 GATEWAY dATA sHEET
Version
Initial release
LKY
Content
1. Overview 3
2. Hardware and Software Specifications 4
3. Product Selection 6
4. Electromagnetic Compatibility Testing 7
5. Environmental Suitability Testing 8
6. Packaging 9
7. Technical Support & Services 9
Overview

BE120 Series Modbus to IEC61850 Gateway — A high-performance industrial protocol conversion gateway designed specifically for the Energy and Power IoT sector. With exceptional stability, flexible communication methods, and powerful data processing capabilities, it empowers the intelligent upgrading of industrial systems.
Key Highlights

Powered by a dual-core Cortex-A7 processor with a clock speed of up to 1.2GHz, the gateway supports high-speed acquisition of tens of thousands of data points, effortlessly handling complex industrial scenarios. Optional 1GB RAM and 8GB storage ensure smooth multitasking and ample data storage.

Operates in a wide temperature range of -45℃ to 80℃ and passes EMC/EMI interference tests, making it suitable for extreme temperatures and electromagnetic environments.Fully isolated design (serial ports/Ethernet), built-in independent hardware watchdog, and corrosion-resistant titanium alloy enclosure ensure 24/7 stable operation.

Supports 4/8 isolated RS485/232 serial ports, fully compatible with Modbus RTU/TCP protocols. Dual Ethernet ports plus optional WiFi/4G/5G multi-mode communication enable seamless integration with both cloud and local systems.
Built-in IEC61850 protocol stack with SCL file configuration support enables efficient two-wayconversion between Modbus and IEC61850, streamlining energy and power system integration.
Typical Applications
Smart substation monitoring

Supports 4/8 isolated RS485/232 serial ports, fully compatible with Modbus RTU/TCP protocols. Dual Ethernet ports plus optional WiFi/4G/5G multi-mode communication enable seamless integration with both cloud and local systems.

Industrial IoT Gateways
BL101 Modbus t o MQTT
Your Reliable IIoT Partner
BL101 Overview
Version

D ownlink support s Modbus RTU Master , Modbus TCP Master U plink suppor ts MQTT B uilt-in cloud drivers such as AWS IoT, ThingsBoard, H UAWEI IoT, A LI IoT, BLIIOT Cloud Supports up to 10 devices with 512 data points collected. A dopts embedded ARM MCU, and developed based on Linux OS system . C omes with 2 RS485/RS232 serial ports, 1 power input, 2 Ethernet ports and 2 USB ports. 4G, WiFi or Ethernet ports to access the Internet Remote configuration, remote firmware upgrade for easy remote maintenance. Adopt s BLIIOT's patented rail-clip technology, supports standard DIN35 rail mounting and wall mounting.
D ownlink support s Modbus RTU Master , Modbus TCP Master
U plink suppor ts MQTT
B uilt-in cloud drivers such as AWS IoT, ThingsBoard, H UAWEI IoT, A LI IoT, BLIIOT Cloud
Supports up to 10 devices with 512 data points collected.
A dopts embedded ARM MCU, and developed based on Linux OS system .
