4G, WiFi or Ethernet ports to access the Internet
Remote configuration, remote firmware upgrade for easy remote maintenance.
Adopt s BLIIOT's patented rail-clip technology, supports standard DIN35 rail mounting and wall mounting.
Features

DC 9-36V wide power voltage input with wiring terminal. Anti-reverse connection protection ; 2 channel RS485/RS232 ; Serial ports support 2400bps-115200bps baud rate; 1, 2 bits stop bit ; 7, 8 bits data bit ; None, Odd, Even parity bit; 2 channel RJ45 ports(1 WAN and 1 LAN). Data can be collected from devices connected to WAN and LAN port or cascaded switch devices. Comes with link and data indicators. Built-in isolation transformer with up to 2KV electromagnetic insulation. Supports remote configuration and remote firmware upgrade; Supports the reporting of CPU usage, memory usage, and disk usage, Ethernet port device s , serial port device s , 4G signal, etc. Supports routing functions and cascading switch data acquisition ; Supports 4G function and can set APN parameters; When connecting to the external network, it will prioritize wired Internet access and switch to 4G network when there is no wired network; Supports OpenVPN ; Supports Modbus RTU to Modbus TCP, transparent transmission; Use RESET button to restore factory settings (long press in power-on state until RUN indicator goes out); Supports hardware and software watchdogs ; Dimension 30mmx83mmx110mm, DIN rail mounting or wall mounting.
DC 9-36V wide power voltage input with wiring terminal. Anti-reverse connection protection ;
2 channel RS485/RS232 ;
Serial ports support 2400bps-115200bps baud rate; 1, 2 bits stop bit ; 7, 8 bits data bit ; None, Odd, Even parity bit;

2 channel RJ45 ports(1 WAN and 1 LAN). Data can be collected from devices connected to WAN and LAN port or cascaded switch devices. Comes with link and data indicators. Built-in isolation transformer with up to 2KV electromagnetic insulation.
Supports remote configuration and remote firmware upgrade;

preview_paragraphs: Industrial IoT Gateways BL1 20AC Air Conditioning Gateway
Industrial IoT Gateways
BL1 20AC Air Conditioning Gateway
Your Reliable IIoT Partner
BL1 20AC Overview
Version

D ownlink support s Modbus RTU Master , Modbus TCP Master U plink suppor ts Modbus RTU, Modbus TCP Supports up to 10 devices with 512 data points collected. A dopts embedded ARM MCU, and developed based on Linux OS system . C omes with 2 RS485/RS232 serial ports, 1 power input, 2 Ethernet ports and 2 USB ports. 4G, WiFi or Ethernet ports to access the Internet Remote configuration, remote firmware upgrade for easy remote maintenance. Adopt s BLIIOT's patented rail-clip technology, supports standard DIN35 rail mounting and wall mounting.
D ownlink support s Modbus RTU Master , Modbus TCP Master
U plink suppor ts Modbus RTU, Modbus TCP
Supports up to 10 devices with 512 data points collected.
A dopts embedded ARM MCU, and developed based on Linux OS system .
C omes with 2 RS485/RS232 serial ports, 1 power input, 2 Ethernet ports and 2 USB ports.
4G, WiFi or Ethernet ports to access the Internet
Remote configuration, remote firmware upgrade for easy remote maintenance.
Adopt s BLIIOT's patented rail-clip technology, supports standard DIN35 rail mounting and wall mounting.
Features

DC 9-36V wide power voltage input with wiring terminal. Anti-reverse connection protection ; 2 channel RS485/RS232 ; Serial ports support 2400bps-115200bps baud rate; 1, 2 bits stop bit ; 7, 8 bits data bit ; None, Odd, Even parity bit; 2 channel RJ45 ports(1 WAN and 1 LAN). Data can be collected from devices connected to WAN and LAN port or cascaded switch devices. Comes with link and data indicators. Built-in isolation transformer with up to 2KV electromagnetic insulation. Supports remote configuration and remote firmware upgrade; Supports the reporting of CPU usage, memory usage, disk usage, Ethernet port device s , serial port device s , 4G signal, etc. Supports routing functions and cascading switch data acquisition ; Supports 4G function and can set APN parameters; When connecting to the external network, it will prioritize wired Internet access and switch to 4G network when there is no wired network; Supports OpenVPN ; Supports Modbus RTU to Modbus TCP, Modbus TCP to Modbus RTU, transparent transmission; Use RESET button to restore factory settings (long press in power-on state until RUN indicator goes out); Supports hardware and software watchdogs ; Dimension 30mmx83mmx110mm, DIN rail mounting or wall mounting.
DC 9-36V wide power voltage input with wiring terminal. Anti-reverse connection protection ;
2 channel RS485/RS232 ;
Serial ports support 2400bps-115200bps baud rate; 1, 2 bits stop bit ; 7, 8 bits data bit ; None, Odd, Even parity bit;

Supports the reporting of CPU usage, memory usage, disk usage, Ethernet port device s , serial port device s , 4G signal, etc.

preview_paragraphs: Industrial IoT Gateways BL1 20BN BACnet to Modbus
Industrial IoT Gateways
BL1 20BN BACnet to Modbus
Your Reliable IIoT Partner
BL1 20BN Overview
Version

D ownlink support s BACnet/IP, BACnet MS/TP U plink suppor ts Modbus RTU, Modbus TCP Supports up to 10 devices with 512 data points collected. A dopts embedded ARM MCU, and developed based on Linux OS system . C omes with 2 RS485/RS232 serial ports, 1 power input, 2 Ethernet ports and 2 USB ports. 4G, WiFi or Ethernet ports to access the Internet Remote configuration, remote firmware upgrade for easy remote maintenance. Adopt s BLIIOT's patented rail-clip technology, supports standard DIN35 rail mounting and wall mounting.
D ownlink support s BACnet/IP, BACnet MS/TP
U plink suppor ts Modbus RTU, Modbus TCP
Supports up to 10 devices with 512 data points collected.
A dopts embedded ARM MCU, and developed based on Linux OS system .
C omes with 2 RS485/RS232 serial ports, 1 power input, 2 Ethernet ports and 2 USB ports.
4G, WiFi or Ethernet ports to access the Internet
Remote configuration, remote firmware upgrade for easy remote maintenance.
Adopt s BLIIOT's patented rail-clip technology, supports standard DIN35 rail mounting and wall mounting.
Features

DC 9-36V wide power voltage input with wiring terminal. Anti-reverse connection protection ; 2 channel RS485/RS232 ; Serial ports support 2400bps-115200bps baud rate; 1, 2 bits stop bit ; 7, 8 bits data bit ; None, Odd, Even parity bit; 2 channel RJ45 ports(1 WAN and 1 LAN). Data can be collected from devices connected to WAN and LAN port or cascaded switch devices. Comes with link and data indicators. Built-in isolation transformer with up to 2KV electromagnetic insulation. Supports remote configuration and remote firmware upgrade; Supports the reporting of CPU usage, memory usage, disk usage, Ethernet port device s , serial port device s , 4G signal, etc. Supports routing functions and cascading switch data acquisition ; Supports 4G function and can set APN parameters; When connecting to the external network, it will prioritize wired Internet access and switch to 4G network when there is no wired network; Supports OpenVPN ; Supports Modbus RTU to Modbus TCP, Modbus TCP to Modbus RTU, transparent transmission; Use RESET button to restore factory settings (long press in power-on state until RUN indicator goes out); Supports hardware and software watchdogs ; Dimension 30mmx83mmx110mm, DIN rail mounting or wall mounting.
DC 9-36V wide power voltage input with wiring terminal. Anti-reverse connection protection ;
2 channel RS485/RS232 ;
Serial ports support 2400bps-115200bps baud rate; 1, 2 bits stop bit ; 7, 8 bits data bit ; None, Odd, Even parity bit;

2 channel RJ45 ports(1 WAN and 1 LAN). Data can be collected from devices connected to WAN and LAN port or cascaded switch devices. Comes with link and data indicators. Built-in isolation transformer with up to 2KV electromagnetic insulation.
Supports remote configuration and remote firmware upgrade;
Supports the reporting of CPU usage, memory usage, disk usage, Ethernet port device s , serial port device s , 4G signal, etc.

Product Overview

The BA190 is an IOy series industrial-grade multifunction programmable BACnet/IP remote I/O module — a high-performance industrial device specially designed for building automation and intelligent building systems. It adopts electrical isolation technology, has passed EMC/EMI tests and -45 to 80°C high and low temperature verification, and features a built-in independent hardware watchdog to ensure long-term stable operation in harsh environments.

Through the BACnet/IP protocol, it enables seamless integration with other building control systems, supporting monitoring and control of various field devices, fully meeting the demands of modern building management.

Product Overview

The BA190 is an IOy series industrial-grade multifunction programmable BACnet/IP remote I/O module — a high-performance industrial device specially designed for building automation and intelligent building systems. It adopts electrical isolation technology, has passed EMC/EMI tests and -45 to 80°C high and low temperature verification, and features a built-in independent hardware watchdog to ensure long-term stable operation in harsh environments.

Through the BACnet/IP protocol, it enables seamless integration with other building control systems, supporting monitoring and control of various field devices, fully meeting the demands of modern building management.
Key Features
Communication Interface: Equipped with two 10/100M adaptive Ethernet ports, supporting standard BACnet/IP protocol and cascading.

Data Acquisition: One isolated RS485 port supports Modbus RTU master mode, enabling data collection from smart meters and conversion to BACnet/IP . Logic Control: Supports quick implementation of register operations and logic control via a built-in web server, enabling intelligent regulation of systems such as lighting, air conditioning, and ventilation, serving as an alternative to traditional PLC control devices.

Remote Configuration: Supports quick configuration and programming via web interface for efficient data acquisition and control. Remote Maintenance: Integrated with BLRAT (Beilai Remote Access Tool), allowing remote firmware upgrades and parameter configuration.

Flexible Expansion: Provides 1 to 3 I/O expansion slots for flexible combination of I/O boards, adaptable to various industrial applications. B A 190, with its high reliability, flexible expansion, and convenient maintenance, supports the efficient operation and maintenance of Industrial IoT and industrial automation systems.
Typical Application Areas

Smart Manufacturing and Industrial Automation: The Ethernet I/O module is used as an extension of the PLC, connecting to sensors and actuators on the production line for data acquisition and equipment control.

Product Overview
The BA190 is an IOy series industrial-grade multifunction programmable BACnet/IP remote I/O module — a high-performance industrial device specially designed for building automation and intelligent building systems. It adopts electrical isolation technology, has passed EMC/EMI tests and -45 to 80°C high and low temperature verification, and features a built-in independent hardware watchdog to ensure long-term stable operation in harsh environments.
Through the BACnet/IP protocol, it enables seamless integration with other building control systems, supporting monitoring and control of various field devices, fully meeting the demands of modern building management.
Key Features
Communication Interface: Equipped with two 10/100M adaptive Ethernet ports, supporting standard BACnet/IP protocol and cascading.
Data Acquisition: One isolated RS485 port supports Modbus RTU master mode, enabling data collection from smart meters and conversion to BACnet/IP .
Logic Control: Supports quick implementation of register operations and logic control via a built-in web server, enabling intelligent regulation of systems such as lighting, air conditioning, and ventilation, serving as an alternative to traditional PLC control devices.
Remote Configuration: Supports quick configuration and programming via web interface for efficient data acquisition and control.
Remote Maintenance: Integrated with BLRAT (Beilai Remote Access Tool), allowing remote firmware upgrades and parameter configuration.
Flexible Expansion: Provides 1 to 3 I/O expansion slots for flexible combination of I/O boards, adaptable to various industrial applications.
B A 190, with its high reliability, flexible expansion, and convenient maintenance, supports the efficient operation and maintenance of Industrial IoT and industrial automation systems.
Typical Application Areas
Smart Manufacturing and Industrial Automation: The Ethernet I/O module is used as an extension of the PLC, connecting to sensors and actuators on the production line for data acquisition and equipment control.
Building Automation and Smart Home Management: Connects to devices such as lighting, air conditioning, security systems, access control, and electric doors, enabling device monitoring and remote control. Through the BACnet/IP protocol, users can easily manage various devices within the building, enhancing the comfort and security of residential and office environments.
Agriculture and Environmental Management: Monitors temperature and humidity data, controls equipment such as blowers and curtain motors to optimize crop growth conditions; manages ventilation fans, lighting systems, water supply equipment, and other devices for effective livestock environment management.
IoT Environmental Monitoring System: Serves as an IoT node, connecting to various sensors such as temperature, humidity, and gas sensors to upload data to the cloud platform.
Industrial Network Communication and Data Acquisition: As a BACnet/IP remote expansion I/O module, it communicates with industrial equipment to enable data acquisition and control.
Energy Storage System Monitoring: Monitors parameters such as battery status, current and voltage, temperature, and alarms in energy storage systems, enabling remote monitoring and intelligent management of the system.
Robotic Arm Control and I/O Signal Acquisition: Serves as the I/O module for the robotic arm, used to collect and control the arm's movements and operations.
Subway Station Equipment Monitoring: Applied in subway stations, connecting to sensors of various devices to enable real-time monitoring of equipment operating status, supporting the operation and maintenance of subway station equipment.
Wind Power Generation Monitoring: Monitors signals such as the status, speed, wind speed, wind direction, temperature, and alarms of wind turbines for remote monitoring and maintenance of wind farms.

Product Overview

The BE190 is an IOy series industrial-grade multifunction programmable IEC104 remote I/O module, specifically designed for power monitoring and automation systems. It adopts electrical isolation technology, has passed EMC/EMI tests and -45 to 80°C high and low temperature verification, and features a built-in independent hardware watchdog to ensure long-term stable operation in harsh environments.
It is widely used in intelligent substations, distribution automation, power grid monitoring, andnew energy power plants.

Product Overview

The BE190 is an IOy series industrial-grade multifunction programmable IEC104 remote I/O module, specifically designed for power monitoring and automation systems. It adopts electrical isolation technology, has passed EMC/EMI tests and -45 to 80°C high and low temperature verification, and features a built-in independent hardware watchdog to ensure long-term stable operation in harsh environments.
It is widely used in intelligent substations, distribution automation, power grid monitoring, andnew energy power plants.
Key Features
Communication Interface: Equipped with two 10/100M adaptive Ethernet ports, supporting standard IEC104 protocol and cascading.

Data Acquisition: One isolated RS485 port supports Modbus RTU master mode, enabling data collection from smart meters and conversion to IEC104 . Logic Control: Can quickly implement register operations and logic control via a web server, serving as an alternative to traditional PLC control devices.

Remote Configuration: Supports quick configuration and programming via web interface for efficient data acquisition and control. Remote Maintenance: Integrated with BLRAT (Beilai Remote Access Tool), allowing remote firmware upgrades and parameter configuration.

Flexible Expansion: Provides 1 to 3 I/O expansion slots for flexible combination of I/O boards, adaptable to various industrial applications. B E 190, with its high reliability, flexible expansion, and convenient maintenance, supports the efficient operation and maintenance of Industrial IoT and industrial automation systems.
Typical Application Areas

Smart Substation Automation Monitoring: Collects switch status data from devices such as circuit breakers and disconnect switches, as well as analog data like current, voltage, and power, and uploads it to the substation monitoring system via the IEC104 protocol.

Distribution Network Automation Terminal: Deployed in ring main units and switching stations, it collects line current, voltage, and fault indicator signals, and uploads the data to the distribution network system via the IEC 104 protocol.

Centralized Control Access for New Energy Power Plants: In photovoltaic power stations and wind farms, it aggregates operational data from inverters, box transformers, and meteorological stations (such as power generation, equipment temperature, and wind speed), converts it into the IEC 104 protocol, and uploads the data to the central control center.

Power Grid Dispatch Data Gateway: As a station-end communication gateway, it can map Modbus protocol instrument data to standard IEC 104 information objects and upload the data to the dispatching master station.

The BE190 is an IOy series industrial-grade multifunction programmable IEC104 remote I/O module, specifically designed for power monitoring and automation systems. It adopts electrical isolation technology, has passed EMC/EMI tests and -45 to 80°C high and low temperature verification, and features a built-in independent hardware watchdog to ensure long-term stable operation in harsh environments.
It is widely used in intelligent substations, distribution automation, power grid monitoring, andnew energy power plants.
Key Features
Communication Interface: Equipped with two 10/100M adaptive Ethernet ports, supporting standard IEC104 protocol and cascading.
Data Acquisition: One isolated RS485 port supports Modbus RTU master mode, enabling data collection from smart meters and conversion to IEC104 .
Logic Control: Can quickly implement register operations and logic control via a web server, serving as an alternative to traditional PLC control devices.
Remote Configuration: Supports quick configuration and programming via web interface for efficient data acquisition and control.
Remote Maintenance: Integrated with BLRAT (Beilai Remote Access Tool), allowing remote firmware upgrades and parameter configuration.
Flexible Expansion: Provides 1 to 3 I/O expansion slots for flexible combination of I/O boards, adaptable to various industrial applications.
B E 190, with its high reliability, flexible expansion, and convenient maintenance, supports the efficient operation and maintenance of Industrial IoT and industrial automation systems.
Typical Application Areas
Smart Substation Automation Monitoring: Collects switch status data from devices such as circuit breakers and disconnect switches, as well as analog data like current, voltage, and power, and uploads it to the substation monitoring system via the IEC104 protocol.
Distribution Network Automation Terminal: Deployed in ring main units and switching stations, it collects line current, voltage, and fault indicator signals, and uploads the data to the distribution network system via the IEC 104 protocol.
Centralized Control Access for New Energy Power Plants: In photovoltaic power stations and wind farms, it aggregates operational data from inverters, box transformers, and meteorological stations (such as power generation, equipment temperature, and wind speed), converts it into the IEC 104 protocol, and uploads the data to the central control center.
Power Grid Dispatch Data Gateway: As a station-end communication gateway, it can map Modbus protocol instrument data to standard IEC 104 information objects and upload the data to the dispatching master station.
Power System Fault Monitoring and Automated Protection: In power systems, it serves as a key node for fault monitoring and automated protection, enabling rapid detection and response to power equipment faults, thereby enhancing the safety and reliability of the system.
Smart Distribution Network Monitoring: As part of the smart distribution network, it connects to various sensors and devices, continuously monitoring the operational status of the distribution network, and supports fault location and power restoration.
Energy Storage System Monitoring: In energy storage systems, it real-time monitors battery status, charging and discharging parameters, and temperature, supporting the efficient operation and intelligent management of the energy storage system.
Remote Monitoring and Maintenance of Power Equipment: Through the IEC104 I/O module, it connects to devices such as generators and transformers, enabling remote status monitoring and fault diagnosis, improving the efficiency and accuracy of equipment maintenance.
Electric Vehicle Charging Station Management: Applied in electric vehicle charging stations, it monitors charging status, current, voltage, and other parameters, enabling intelligent management and monitoring of the charging process.

Product Overview

BL190 is an industrial-grade, multifunctional, and programmable remote I/O module from the IOy series. It features electrical isolation technology, has passed EMC/EMI testing, and is validated to operate reliably under extreme temperatures ranging from -45°C to 80°C. Equipped with an independent hardware watchdog, the BL190 ensures long-term stable performance in harsh environments. It is widely used in automation control scenarios such as smart factories, energy systems, urban infrastructure, transportation, and agriculture.
Key Features

3. Product Specifications 4 4. Model Selection 8 5. Electromagnetic Compatibility Testing 9 6. Environmental Suitability Testing 10
Product Overview

BL190 is an industrial-grade, multifunctional, and programmable remote I/O module from the IOy series. It features electrical isolation technology, has passed EMC/EMI testing, and is validated to operate reliably under extreme temperatures ranging from -45°C to 80°C. Equipped with an independent hardware watchdog, the BL190 ensures long-term stable performance in harsh environments. It is widely used in automation control scenarios such as smart factories, energy systems, urban infrastructure, transportation, and agriculture.
Key Features
Communication Interface: Equipped with two 10/100M adaptive Ethernet ports, supporting Modbus TCP protocol and cascading.

Data Acquisition: One isolated RS485 port supports Modbus RTU master mode, enabling data collection from smart meters and conversion to Modbus TCP. Logic Control: Built-in web server enables fast implementation of register operations and logic control, serving as a PLC alternative.

Remote Configuration: Supports quick configuration and programming via web interface for efficient data acquisition and control. Remote Maintenance: Integrated with BLRAT (Beilai Remote Access Tool), allowing remote firmware upgrades and parameter configuration.

Flexible Expansion: Provides 1 to 3 I/O expansion slots for flexible combination of I/O boards, adaptable to various industrial applications. BL190, with its high reliability, flexible expansion, and convenient maintenance, supports the efficient operation and maintenance of Industrial IoT and industrial automation systems.
Typical Application Areas

Smart Manufacturing and Industrial Automation: The Ethernet I/O module is used as an extension of the PLC, connecting to sensors and actuators on the production line for data acquisition and equipment control. Building Automation and Smart Home Management: Connects to devices such as lighting, air conditioning, security systems, access control, and electric doors for device monitoring and remote control.

Agriculture and Environmental Management: Monitors temperature and humidity data, controls equipment such as blowers and curtain motors to optimize crop growth conditions; manages ventilation fans, lighting systems, water supply equipment, and other devices for effective livestock environment management.

Product Overview
BL190 is an industrial-grade, multifunctional, and programmable remote I/O module from the IOy series. It features electrical isolation technology, has passed EMC/EMI testing, and is validated to operate reliably under extreme temperatures ranging from -45°C to 80°C. Equipped with an independent hardware watchdog, the BL190 ensures long-term stable performance in harsh environments. It is widely used in automation control scenarios such as smart factories, energy systems, urban infrastructure, transportation, and agriculture.
Key Features
Communication Interface: Equipped with two 10/100M adaptive Ethernet ports, supporting Modbus TCP protocol and cascading.
Data Acquisition: One isolated RS485 port supports Modbus RTU master mode, enabling data collection from smart meters and conversion to Modbus TCP.
Logic Control: Built-in web server enables fast implementation of register operations and logic control, serving as a PLC alternative.
Remote Configuration: Supports quick configuration and programming via web interface for efficient data acquisition and control.
Remote Maintenance: Integrated with BLRAT (Beilai Remote Access Tool), allowing remote firmware upgrades and parameter configuration.
Flexible Expansion: Provides 1 to 3 I/O expansion slots for flexible combination of I/O boards, adaptable to various industrial applications.
BL190, with its high reliability, flexible expansion, and convenient maintenance, supports the efficient operation and maintenance of Industrial IoT and industrial automation systems.
Typical Application Areas
Smart Manufacturing and Industrial Automation: The Ethernet I/O module is used as an extension of the PLC, connecting to sensors and actuators on the production line for data acquisition and equipment control.
Building Automation and Smart Home Management: Connects to devices such as lighting, air conditioning, security systems, access control, and electric doors for device monitoring and remote control.
Agriculture and Environmental Management: Monitors temperature and humidity data, controls equipment such as blowers and curtain motors to optimize crop growth conditions; manages ventilation fans, lighting systems, water supply equipment, and other devices for effective livestock environment management.
IoT Environmental Monitoring System: Serves as an IoT node, connecting to various sensors such as temperature, humidity, and gas sensors to upload data to the cloud platform.
Industrial Network Communication and Data Acquisition: Serves as a Modbus TCP remote expansion I/O module, communicating with industrial equipment to achieve data acquisition and control.
Energy Storage System Monitoring: Monitors parameters such as battery status, current and voltage, temperature, and alarms in energy storage systems, enabling remote monitoring and intelligent management of the system.
Robotic Arm Control and I/O Signal Acquisition: Serves as the I/O module for the robotic arm, used to collect and control the arm's movements and operations.
Subway Station Equipment Monitoring: Applied in subway stations, connecting to sensors of various devices to enable real-time monitoring of equipment operating status, supporting the operation and maintenance of subway station equipment.
Wind Power Generation Monitoring: Monitors signals such as the status, speed, wind speed, wind direction, temperature, and alarms of wind turbines for remote monitoring and maintenance of wind farms.

Product Overview

The BL19 1 is an IOy series industrial-grade multifunction programmable OPC UA remote I/Omodule. It adopts electrical isolation technology, has passed EMC/EMI tests and -45 to 80°Chigh and low temperature verification, and features a built-in independent hardware watchdogto ensure long-term stable operation in harsh environments.

It can directly connect to OPC UA client systems such as SCADA, MES, MOM, ERP, WMSand cloud platforms, seamlessly bridging the OT and IT layers. It serves as the optimal I/O system solution for Industrial Internet, Industry 4.0, intelligent manufacturing, and digital transformation projects, and is widely used in smart factories, energy, urban infrastructure, transportation, agriculture, and other automation control scenarios.

Product Overview

The BL19 1 is an IOy series industrial-grade multifunction programmable OPC UA remote I/Omodule. It adopts electrical isolation technology, has passed EMC/EMI tests and -45 to 80°Chigh and low temperature verification, and features a built-in independent hardware watchdogto ensure long-term stable operation in harsh environments.

It can directly connect to OPC UA client systems such as SCADA, MES, MOM, ERP, WMSand cloud platforms, seamlessly bridging the OT and IT layers. It serves as the optimal I/O system solution for Industrial Internet, Industry 4.0, intelligent manufacturing, and digital transformation projects, and is widely used in smart factories, energy, urban infrastructure, transportation, agriculture, and other automation control scenarios.
Key Features
Communication Interface: Equipped with two 10/100M adaptive Ethernet ports, supporting OPC UA server protocol and cascading.
Data Acquisition: One isolated RS485 port supports Modbus RTU master mode, enabling data collection from smart meters and conversion to OPC UA .

Secure Communication: Supports X.509 certificates, AES-256 encrypted communication, and role-based policies, complying with the IEC62443 industrial cybersecurity standard. Logic Control: Built-in web server enables fast implementation of register operations and logic control, serving as a PLC alternative.

Remote Configuration: Supports quick configuration and programming via web interface for efficient data acquisition and control. Remote Maintenance: Integrated with BLRAT (Beilai Remote Access Tool), allowing remote firmware upgrades and parameter configuration.

Flexible Expansion: Provides 1 to 3 I/O expansion slots for flexible combination of I/O boards, adaptable to various industrial applications. BL19 1 , with its high reliability, flexible expansion, and convenient maintenance, supports the efficient operation and maintenance of Industrial IoT and industrial automation systems.
Typical Application Areas

Product Overview
The BL19 1 is an IOy series industrial-grade multifunction programmable OPC UA remote I/Omodule. It adopts electrical isolation technology, has passed EMC/EMI tests and -45 to 80°Chigh and low temperature verification, and features a built-in independent hardware watchdogto ensure long-term stable operation in harsh environments.
It can directly connect to OPC UA client systems such as SCADA, MES, MOM, ERP, WMSand cloud platforms, seamlessly bridging the OT and IT layers. It serves as the optimal I/O system solution for Industrial Internet, Industry 4.0, intelligent manufacturing, and digital transformation projects, and is widely used in smart factories, energy, urban infrastructure, transportation, agriculture, and other automation control scenarios.
Key Features
Communication Interface: Equipped with two 10/100M adaptive Ethernet ports, supporting OPC UA server protocol and cascading.
Data Acquisition: One isolated RS485 port supports Modbus RTU master mode, enabling data collection from smart meters and conversion to OPC UA .
Secure Communication: Supports X.509 certificates, AES-256 encrypted communication, and role-based policies, complying with the IEC62443 industrial cybersecurity standard.
Logic Control: Built-in web server enables fast implementation of register operations and logic control, serving as a PLC alternative.
Remote Configuration: Supports quick configuration and programming via web interface for efficient data acquisition and control.
Remote Maintenance: Integrated with BLRAT (Beilai Remote Access Tool), allowing remote firmware upgrades and parameter configuration.
Flexible Expansion: Provides 1 to 3 I/O expansion slots for flexible combination of I/O boards, adaptable to various industrial applications.
BL19 1 , with its high reliability, flexible expansion, and convenient maintenance, supports the efficient operation and maintenance of Industrial IoT and industrial automation systems.
Typical Application Areas
Smart Manufacturing and Industrial Automation: The Ethernet I/O module is used as an extension of the PLC, connecting to sensors and actuators on the production line for data acquisition and equipment control.
Building Automation and Smart Home Management: Connects to devices such as lighting, air conditioning, security systems, access control, and electric doors, integrates with the BMS via OPC UA, and enables equipment monitoring and remote control.
Agriculture and Environmental Management: Monitors temperature and humidity data, controls equipment such as blowers and curtain motors to optimize crop growth conditions; manages ventilation fans, lighting systems, water supply equipment, and other devices for effective livestock environment management.
IoT Environmental Monitoring System: Serves as an IoT node, connecting to various sensors such as temperature, humidity, and gas sensors to upload data to the cloud platform.
Industrial Network Communication and Data Acquisition: As an OPC UA remote expansion I/O module, it communicates with industrial equipment to enable data acquisition and control, and uniformly outputs data through an OPC UA interface, simplifying the IT/OT integration architecture.
Energy Storage System Monitoring: Monitors parameters such as battery status, current and voltage, temperature, and alarms in energy storage systems, enabling remote monitoring and intelligent management of the system.
Robotic Arm Control and I/O Signal Acquisition: Serves as the I/O module for the robotic arm, used to collect and control the arm's movements and operations.
Subway Station Equipment Monitoring: Applied in subway stations, connecting to sensors of various devices to enable real-time monitoring of equipment operating status, supporting the operation and maintenance of subway station equipment.
Wind Power Generation Monitoring: Monitors signals such as the status, speed, wind speed, wind direction, temperature, and alarms of wind turbines for remote monitoring and maintenance of wind farms.

Product Overview

The BL19 2 is an IOy series industrial-grade multifunction programmable MQTT remote I/O module. It adopts electrical isolation technology, has passed EMC/EMI tests and -45 to 80°C high and low temperature verification, and features a built-in independent hardware watchdog to ensure long-term stable operation in harsh environments. It adopts electrical isolation technology, has passed EMC/EMI tests and -45 to 80°C high and low temperature verification, and features a built-in independent hardware watchdog to ensure long-term stable operation in harsh environments. It is widely used in smart factories, energy, urban infrastructure, transportation, agriculture, and other automation control applications.
Key Features
Communication Interface: Equipped with two 10/100M adaptive Ethernet ports, supporting MQTT protocol and AWS IoT, ThingsBoard, Alibaba Cloud, HUAWEI Cloud .

Remote Configuration: Supports quick configuration and programming via web interface for efficient data acquisition and control. Remote Maintenance: Integrated with BLRAT (Beilai Remote Access Tool), allowing remote firmware upgrades and parameter configuration.

It is widely used in smart factories, energy, urban infrastructure, transportation, agriculture, and other automation control applications.

Communication Interface: Equipped with two 10/100M adaptive Ethernet ports, supporting MQTT protocol and AWS IoT, ThingsBoard, Alibaba Cloud, HUAWEI Cloud .
Data Acquisition: One isolated RS485 port supports Modbus RTU master mode, enabling data collection from smart meters and conversion to MQTT .
Logic Control: Built-in web server enables fast implementation of register operations and logic control, serving as a PLC alternative.
Remote Configuration: Supports quick configuration and programming via web interface for efficient data acquisition and control.

Smart Manufacturing and Industrial Automation: The Ethernet I/O module is used as an extension of the PLC, connecting to sensors and actuators on the production line for data acquisition and equipment control.

Product Overview

The BL19 3 is an IOy series industrial-grade multifunction programmable SNMP remote I/O module. It adopts electrical isolation technology, has passed EMC/EMI tests and -45 to 80°C high and low temperature verification, and features a built-in independent hardware watchdogto ensure long-term stable operation in harsh environments.

Designed specifically for networked device monitoring and management, the BL19 3 is an industrial-grade data acquisition and control I/O module. It supports SNMP v1/v2c/v3 protocols and comes with a built-in standard MIB library, allowing seamless integration into enterprise IT network management systems. It is widely used in smart factories, energy, urban infrastructure, transportation, agriculture, and other automation scenarios requiring network-based operations and maintenance.

Product Overview

The BL19 3 is an IOy series industrial-grade multifunction programmable SNMP remote I/O module. It adopts electrical isolation technology, has passed EMC/EMI tests and -45 to 80°C high and low temperature verification, and features a built-in independent hardware watchdogto ensure long-term stable operation in harsh environments.

Designed specifically for networked device monitoring and management, the BL19 3 is an industrial-grade data acquisition and control I/O module. It supports SNMP v1/v2c/v3 protocols and comes with a built-in standard MIB library, allowing seamless integration into enterprise IT network management systems. It is widely used in smart factories, energy, urban infrastructure, transportation, agriculture, and other automation scenarios requiring network-based operations and maintenance.
Key Features
Communication Interface: Equipped with two 10/100M adaptive Ethernet ports, supporting SNMP protocol and cascading.
Data Acquisition: One isolated RS485 port supports Modbus RTU master mode, enablingdata collection from smart meters and conversion to SNMP OID .

Industrial-grade Network Management: Supports SNMP v3 encrypted communication, offers user policy management, and complies with enterprise-level network security policies. Logic Control: Built-in web server enables fast implementation of register operations and logic control, serving as a PLC alternative.

Remote Configuration: Supports quick configuration and programming via web interface for efficient data acquisition and control. Remote Maintenance: Integrated with BLRAT (Beilai Remote Access Tool), allowing remote firmware upgrades and parameter configuration.

Flexible Expansion: Provides 1 to 3 I/O expansion slots for flexible combination of I/O boards, adaptable to various industrial applications. BL19 3 , with its high reliability, flexible expansion, and convenient maintenance, supports the efficient operation and maintenance of Industrial IoT and industrial automation systems.
Typical Application Areas

Smart Manufacturing and Industrial Automation: Use the Ethernet I/O module as an extension to the PLC, connecting to sensors and actuators on the production line, and achieve data acquisition and device control through SNMP GET and SET commands. Building Automation and Smart Home Management: Convert data from devices such as lighting, air conditioning, security systems, access control, and electric doors into SNMP MIB objects, integrate them into the IT infrastructure monitoring system, and enable centralized management of all devices.

Agriculture and Environmental Management: Monitors temperature and humidity data, controls equipment such as blowers and curtain motors to optimize crop growth conditions; manages ventilation fans, lighting systems, water supply equipment, and other devices for effective livestock environment management.
IoT Environmental Monitoring System: Serves as an IoT node, connecting to various sensors such as temperature, humidity, and gas sensors to upload data to the cloud platform.

GSM Gate Opener Remote Relay Switch 1. Product details
GSM Gate Opener Remote Relay Switch

The RTU5024 is an powerful remote relay controller, it is a very simple device which can be used for authorized door access, controlling gates, switching of remote equipments, car parking systems. Actually the RTU5024 can be used in places which require to turn ON/OFF your system, machines, equipments remotely with a FREE call from your mobile phone.

Just dial from Authorized User number at the specified time then the Barrier and doors are opened, or the machine are turn on or off by the RTU5024. There are no call costs, the RTU5024 rejects the call from authorized number then carries out the turn ON/OFF action.
Moreover, the user can be authorized at the specified time to operate it, after timeout, will automatically change to unauthorized type.
2. Features
Advantages
Quad-band, can work in the worldwide GSM Networks;
No call charges. the GSM GPRS Relay Switch rejects the call from authorized number then carries out the turn ON/OFF action on the first 'ring';
Multiple applications. (gates, bollards, barriers, garage doors, shutters and access doors or machines);
Secure - Using caller-ID for identification, unknown callers are ignored;
Can be operated from anywhere, no distance limit;
Add or remove users by SMS Text command;
highlights: 2. Features Advantages Quad-band, can work in the worldwide GSM Networks; No call charges. the GSM GPRS Relay Switch rejects the call from authorized number then carries out the turn ON/OFF action on the first 'ring';

Multiple applications. (gates, bollards, barriers, garage doors, shutters and access doors or machines); Secure - Using caller-ID for identification, unknown callers are ignored; Can be operated from anywhere, no distance limit; Add or remove users by SMS Text command;

One output with relay rating 3A/240VAC for connecting the switch of the door or machines; The relay action will return a SMS confirmation to the owner or authorized call in number, this function is editable by user; The relay close or open time is programmable;

Multiple applications. (gates, bollards, barriers, garage doors, shutters and access doors or machines); Smart phone APP for configuration available. search GSM Gate Opener RTU5024 on Google play for downloading APP. Setting

GSM Frequency Quad-band 850/900/1800/1900MHz Digital Output NC/NO dry contact, 3A/240VAC DC Power supply 9~24VDC/2A Power consumption 12V input Max. 50mA/Average 25mA SIM Card Support 3V SIM Card Antenna 50Ω SMA Antenna interface Temperature range -20~+60 °C Humidity range Relative humidity 90% Exterior dimension W102mm*D76mm*H27mm Net Weight 180 g 3. Specifications Dimensions GSM Frequency Quad-band 850/900/1800/1900MHz
Digital Output NC/NO dry contact, 3A/240VAC
DC Power supply 9~24VDC/2A
Power consumption
12V input Max. 50mA/Average 25mA SIM Card Support 3V SIM Card Antenna
50Ω SMA Antenna interface
Temperature range -20~+60 °C
Humidity range
Relative humidity 90% Exterior dimension W102mm*D76mm*H27mm Net Weight

5 . Applications Remote open/close swing/sliding gates, doors, shutters, garage doors, locks with a free call! Residential : Door, gate, garage access control, electronic fan, microwave, air-conditioner control.

Industry: Remote switch equipment, for example: street lights, solar power, motor, inverter, PLC, pumps, fans, etc. Agriculture: Remote control pumps, etc. Business: Remote control electronic boxes, bright billboards, LED signs, etc.

GPRS/3G /4G Gate Opener Remote Access Control 1. Product details
GPRS/3G /4G Gate Opener Remote Access Control

The RTU5025 is an upgraded version of famous RTU5015 gate opener, a very simple device which can be used for remote control swing or sliding gates and doors or switching devices with authorized access management( Caller-ID ),well used on door access, gate control, remote switching, or car parking systems. Actually the RTU5025 can be used in places which require to turn ON/OFF your system, machines, equipments remotely with a FREE phone call from your mobile or fixed line telephone.
Android APP on Google Play available, PC software for programming via USB, remote server system over TCP/IP supported*,users can easily download the access historical data anywhere anytime.
highlights: GSM , 3G or 4G band, distribute worldwide applications; Up to 999 authorized phone numbers can be configured at the specified time for access control; No call charges. Reject calls from authorized number then carries out the turn ON/OFF action on the first 'ring'; Secure – Using C aller - ID for verification , unknown phone calls are ignored;

Multiple applications. (gates, bollards, barriers, garage doors, shutters and access doors or machines); Android APP for configuration, search 3G Gate Opener RTU5025 on Google Play to download it. Digital Inputs

Two Digital input for motion sensor or other sensors to protect your door and windows, SMS alert to owner immediately when triggered; Setting Android APP, SMS command or PC Software programming; Operate from anywhere anytime, no distance limitation;

GSM Gate Opener Remote Relay Switch 1. Product details
GSM Gate Opener Remote Relay Switch

The RTU50 3 4 is an powerful remote relay controller, it is a very simple device which can be used for authorized door access, controlling gates, switching of remote equipments, car parking systems. Actually the RTU50 3 4 can be used in places which require to turn ON/OFF your system, machines, equipments remotely with a FREE call from your mobile phone.

Just dial from Authorized User number at the specified time then the Barrier and doors are opened, or the machine are turn on or off by the RTU50 3 4. There are no call costs, the RTU50 3 4 rejects the call from authorized number then carries out the turn ON/OFF action.
Moreover, the user can be authorized at the specified time to operate it, after timeout, will automatically change to unauthorized type.
2. Features
Advantages
Quad-band, can work in the worldwide GSM Networks;
No call charges. the GSM GPRS Relay Switch rejects the call from authorized number then carries out the turn ON/OFF action on the first 'ring';
Multiple applications. (gates, bollards, barriers, garage doors, shutters and access doors or machines);
Secure - Using caller-ID for identification, unknown callers are ignored;
Can be operated from anywhere, no distance limit;
Add or remove users by SMS Text command;
highlights: 2. Features Advantages Quad-band, can work in the worldwide GSM Networks; No call charges. the GSM GPRS Relay Switch rejects the call from authorized number then carries out the turn ON/OFF action on the first 'ring';

One output with relay rating 3A/240VAC for connecting the switch of the door or machines; The relay action will return a SMS confirmation to the owner or authorized call in number, this function is editable by user; The relay close or open time is programmable;

preview_paragraphs: N 40 -N41Series
Industrial Level 4+1 Intelligent Ethernet Switch
● Support full-duplex or half-duplex mode with auto-negotiation capability .
● S upport 10/100/1000Base-T (X) auto detection, full / half duplex MDI / MDI-X adaptive .
●With storage and forwarding mechanism, cache 8K .
●Redundant dual power supply, input overload and reverse connection protection, wide voltage input 9-60V DC .
●Supports -40-85 °C operating temperature and good EMC interference compatibility performance .
●Compliant with carrier-class operating standards .
Brief Introduction

N40/41 series industrial intelligent Ethernet switches support various 100/Gigabit optical combinations, support Gigabit optical ports, and support plug and play. The switch adopts low power consumption and no fan design to ensure noise-free interference. It also supports -40-85 °C operating temperature and good EMC interference compatibility to ensure stable operation in harsh working environment. I ndustrial application fields are such as factory automation and intelligent traffic, transportation and video surveillance via a fast and stable network terminal access network to provide a safe and reliable solution.

entries.title: Remote Monitoring Your Outdoor Assets In Anywhere and Anytime!
preview_paragraphs: Remote Monitoring Your Outdoor Assets In Anywhere and Anytime!
GSM GPRS Power Facility Alarm
GSM GPRS Outdoor Alarm Controller
Data Sheet
Ver 1. 1 0 Date Issued: 201 2 -08-20
1. Brief introduction

The GSM GPRS Power Facility Alarm (GSM GPRS Outdoor Alarm Controller )S250 is an high-technology and specialized wireless anti-theft controll er special for electricity power transmission devices and outdoor security protection applications .

The GSM GPRS Power Facility Alarm (GSM GPRS Outdoor Alarm Controller )S250 in-built industry microprocessor inside, with waterproof and weatherproof enclosure, supports solar panel powered up. I t provides 2 digital relay outputs ( 240 VAC/ 10 A), 8 digital inputs (Dry contact, L ightning protection, Electrostatic protection, Over current protection .), 3-Phase AC Power Opto-isolated inputs to detect the Electricity A , B, C 3 phase status . It allows you to monitor and control an alarm or remote stations or equipments or machines by SMS(Short Message Service) Or GPRS. It is very suitable for outdoor security protection and Transformer anti-theft requirements, Power Transmission Equipments Burglarproof applications as well as power cable anti-theft and so on. When any cable was cut or loss, or and detector activated, the panel will alert the owner immediately by SMS, or call, as well as to Web Based Monitoring Center. also, it will start the siren immediately. The system with intelligent designed, it can distinguish the normally power off and cut cable power off. This is very useful for power device transmission devices.

The GSM GPRS Power Facility Alarm (GSM GPRS Outdoor Alarm Controller )S250 can work with the Web-Based Alarm Monitoring center, in order to monitoring lots of units in the countryside by Wireless GPRS Network. The Web-Based monitoring center supports Google Map to display the alarm occurrence place directly. Moreover, the user can inquiry the historical record from website at anywhere and anytime. Moreover, the clients can develop its special monitoring center according to the communication protocol directly over wireless GPRS network.

The GSM GPRS Power Facility Alarm (GSM GPRS Outdoor Alarm Controller )S250 supports solar panel, so when the AC Power goes off, it still can keep working well! A nd when the battery voltage is lower than normal, it will alert the users.

Meanwhile, the GSM GPRS Power Facility Alarm adopt Time-Stamped technology, it will inform the administrator by SMS who is operated it or what occurrence. T his is very useful for operation management.
The GSM GPRS Power Facility Alarm (GSM GPRS Outdoor Alarm Controller )S250 can be used as:
A Wireless S witch with SMS R emote C ontrol . SMS texts for switching particular terminals on/off are configurable.

An automation system. Each input can link to output actions, this is very useful when the temperature upto appointed value, need switch on the air-conditioning immediately, or when water overflow and need switch on the dryer, or when somebody broken into the field fence or cut cables need to start the loudly Siren or equipments .

A GSM GPRS Alarm unit . The digital Inputs activations or any of the 3-Phase AC Power cut will alert by SMS or GPRS . Each input can have its own message texts and the message can be programmed by users.
A SMS reporter. The digital Inputs activations or deactivations can be reported by SMS. Each input can have its own message texts and the message can be programmed by users.

A GSM GPRS Remote Termials (GSM GPRS Outdoor Alarm Controller). It can work with the supervisioning center, in the supervisioning center, the own can remote monitoring and control the remotely terminals by GSM GPRS Network.This is very useful to BTS environment monitoring, power transmission system monitoring and other applications.
What Applications does the GSM GPRS Power Facility Alarm (GSM GPRS Outdoor Alarm Controller )S250 suitable for?
1. Electricity transformer and Cable anti-theft application;
2. Electrical Power Unit(EPU) Monitoring and Anti-theft applications;
3 . Power Plant , t ransmission Substation , power towers ;
4. Distribution Grid , transmission grid , power substation ;

【 Special instructions for ordering 】
1、 For the model have DIN input, default digital input type is wet contact (dry contact input is optional);
2、 The master and WT-01 have data transparent transmission function, the master can receive data from the cloud and wireless transmit to WT-01(Max 50pcs), the WT-01 transmit the data to the user’s device via RS485 port, then data communication between TCP and RS485 devices has been accomplished successfully;
3 、 The devices WT-01 themselves also can do data transparent transmission to each other without the master; but the other slaves transmit data through the master only;
4 、The frequency band is 433MHz ( customized 868MHz and 915HMz are available;
5 、The analog input of this product support both 0-5V and 4-20mA(Default 0-5V, 4-20mA is optional);
6 、 The model list describe the numbers of I/O ports, the I/O ports not included in the model list are invalid in the corresponding ports of the device.
Brief Introduction
The S280 is a cost effective remote terminal unit . It inbuilt quad band GSM/GPRS /3G/4G/RJ45 module , LoRa module, and ARM® Cortex™ 32 Bit RISC Core. It is a muti-isolation I/O port remote terminal unit and wireless data acquisition system.
The S280 can be used for monitoring maximum 400 distributed I/O endpoints though maximum 50 wireless Data Acquisition Modules by LoRa wireless network. Also it can be used as for converting the meters, transducers, Data Acquisition modules, PLC data via RS485 serial port to LoRa wireless network and then transmits it to GSM/SMS/GPRS/3G/Ethernet network. It performs as a wired – wireless – SMS/GPRS/ 3G/Ethernet/RS232/RS485 gateway. The range covers about 2~5Km, to add WT-02 Wireless repeaters can increase the wireless distance.
The LoRa Gateway S280 equips 4 digital inputs, 2 solid relay outputs, power status detection module , and on - site temperature and humidity inputs. All of the inputs and outputs are isolation.
The LoRa Gateway S280 can be used as Wireless SMS Alarm when the equipped I/O or 400 distributed I/O alarm occurrence, it also can send pre-definition SMS to up to 10 mobile phone users.
The S280 is suitable for lots of applications, e.g.: Wireless data logging, BTS monitoring, remote data acquisition, telemetrically, farm, energy saving, agriculture, automatically meter reading system, weather station, storage, factory and other applications.
The S280 supports Modbus RTU Slave, Modbus TCP, TCP/UDP, SMS and data transparent transmission protocol through LoRa/ RS232/RS485/GSM/SMS/GPRS/3G/Ethernet.
The Wireless GSM 3G RTU can be used as:
A Wireless Data Acquisition System. Supports monitoring up to 50 wireless data acquisition module for max 400 endpoints by LoRa wireless network, the range covers about 1 Km, Each endpoint can be setup threshold value or alarm conditions, once the value exceed threshold or activated ,it will send out SMS to alert the users immediately.
A Wireless Gateway. Though the WT-01 wireless data transfer unit, it can convert the meters, transducers, Data Acquisition modules, PLC data via RS485 serial port to LoRa wireless network and then transmits it to GSM/SMS/GPRS/3G/Ethernet network. It performs as a wired–wireless – SMS/GPRS/ 3G/Ethernet/RS232/RS485 gateway.
A SMS Alarm Controller. The I / O activation or deactivation can be reported by SMS and optionally confirmed by phone calls. Each input can have its own SMS and the message can be programmed.
A Switch with SMS Remote Control . SMS texts for switching particular terminals on/off or pulse output are configurable.
A Timer-Switch which can be activated automatically . It can be setup when to performs preset logic events, e.g.: timer reports its status, timer switch on/off device or equipment automatically.
A SMS reporter. The LoRa Gateway S280 can setup daily automatically report one or more times of its current status to users automatically.
A Data Logger. The unit can save all of the events or acquisition data in internal memory storage, the historical data can export to CS format via USB port or upload to server by GPRS /3G network according to schedule, no distance limitation.
Typically Application
Suitable Applications:
1. Security Alarm System applications; 2. Supervision and monitoring alarm systems
3. Automatic monitoring system; 4. Vending Machines;
5. Pumping Stations; 6. Buildings and Real Estate;
7. Weather Stations remote control and data logging; 8. Valve controls;
9. Oil and gas pipelines remote control and data logging; 10. Corrosion protection
11. River Monitoring and Flood Control remote control; 12. Wellheads;
13. Energy saving,street lights control system; 14. Transformer stations;
15.Tanks, levels, temperatures,water leakage applications;16. Unmanned machine rooms;
17. Control room application; 18. PLC and Automation System, M2M;
19. GSM Access Control System, GSM Gate Opener, etc.
System Schematic Diagram
Wireless 1Km Wireless 1Km
Wireless 1Km
S280 Mainly Features ( LoRa Gateway )
Inbuilt ARM® Cortex™-M4 32 Bit RISC Core MCU ;
Quadband 900/1800/1900 /2100 Mhz GSM GPRS Module inside ;
Frequency range: 433HMz，868MHz,915HMz；
Widely Rated voltage range, 9~36VDC, Inbuilt large capacity rechargeable backup battery;
Large internal memory to save up to 10 00 historical records, USB port for configuration , upgrade firmware and export records ;
2 Relay output,7A/125V AC，20A/14V DC；
4 digital inputs. Compatible with dry contact / wet node input, logic level 0~1V normally closed, logic level 3~30V is considered normally open ;
It can be used to monitor the on-site ambient temperature and digital humidity sensor. The temperature measurement range is -40~80°C, the accuracy is 0.5°C, the humidity measurement range is 0~99 RH%, and the accuracy is 2% ;
Supports maximum 100 LoRa wireless slave;
Supports I/O ports, and series port. anti-static 15KV, lightning protection;
1 RS485 serial port (Optional: RS232) for Modbus RTU Slave , user-defined protocol or data transparent transmission;.
A cellular network communication module which supports the transmission of Modbus TCP protocol through TCP/IP protocol.
A RJ45 Ethernet port supports the transmission of Modbus RTU protocol through TCP / IP protocol, and with the function of data transparent transmission, 2KV electromagnetic isolation, shell isolation protection;
When the master computer server fails or shuts down, the device actively stores alarm data and historical data during the disconnection period, up to 1000 items, and actively replenishes these missing data after re-online.
Supports remotely restart the RTU, an d configure & operate it by SMS commands remotely;
Supports over voltage protection and phase-reversal protection , provide DC power sources for external device to save wiring cost;
10 SMS Alert and auto dial numbers for receiving alarm message , can program to receive specified alarm message.

Safety Directions
Safe Startup
Do not use unit when using GSM /3G /4G equipment is prohibited or might bring disturbance or danger.
Interference
All wireless equipment might interfere network signals of unit and influence its performance.
Avoid Use at Gas Station
Do not use unit at a gas station. Power off RTU when it near fuels or chemicals.
Power it off near Blasting Places
Please follow relevant restrictive regulations. Avoid using the device in blasting places.
Reasonable Use
Please install the product at suitable places as described in the product documentation. Avoid signal shielded by covering the mainframe.
Use Qualified Maintenance Service
Maintenance can be carried out only by qualified maintainer.

Brief Introduction

R10/R20 high-performance industrial-grade 4G cellular router uses a high-performance 32-bit processor based on Linux. The router supports 2G/3G/4G networks such as GSM/GPRS/EDGE/WCDMA/HSPA+/LTE, and provides high-speed wireless network bandwidth to the device through wireless connection, and it has automatic disconnection of network disconnection, automatic restart of dialing failure, scheduled restart, and ensure a stable connection to network. At the same time, the router has built-in SMS control, VPN, RS485/RS232 serial port and other functions, which can be connected to a variety of terminal devices.

Your Reliable IIoT Partner
DC Signal Isolator
BL150A11(1 In, 1 Out)

Overview BL150A11 DC Signal Isolator detects the current signal in the loop, and then converted to an isolated 1CH current 4~20mA signal, realizing the three-terminal isolation between input, output and power supply. The Isolator can be used with all kinds of instruments and DCS, PLC and other equipment, it is widely used in the oil, chemical, manufacturing, electric power, metallurgy, industrial equipment and other industries. Dimension 110×116×13 ( mm )

Overview BL15 5S 11 RS485 Signal Isolator supports c ommunication signal input, one way in, one way out , Bi-directional communication with half-duplex signal, realizing the three-terminal isolation between input, output and power supply. The Isolator can be used with all kinds of instruments and DCS, PLC and other equipment, it is widely used in the oil, chemical, manufacturing, electric power, metallurgy, industrial equipment and other industries.
